    declare ~tempo := 0.
    declare %_repetition_interval_time[4096] := (0)
    declare %_repetition_interval_time_humanization[4096] := (0)
    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 := real(ms_to_ticks(60000000)) / 960.
    if((~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 # 0.) or ($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_LISTENER))
      $transition0 := 0
      $layer0 := 0
      $result7 := 0
      while($result7 <= 0) 
        $transition0 := 0
        while($transition0 <= 7) 
          $layer0 := 0
          while($layer0 <= 3) 
            if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($result7 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)] >= 0)
              if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($result7 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)]]] = 0) and (%_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($result7 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)] > 0))
                %_repetition_interval_time[($result7 * 4096) + (($transition0 * 512) + $layer0)] := int((60000. / ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000) * (4. / real(%_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($result7 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)])))
              end if
            end if
            inc($layer0)
          end while
          inc($transition0)
        end while
        inc($result7)
      end while
      ~tempo := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000
    end if

    declare $_id
    declare %decode[2]
    make_persistent(%decode)
    read_persistent_var(%decode)
    declare @decode_path
    @_ret1110 := "decode"
    $transition_type0 := 81202
    @name2 := ""
    $result12 := 4
    %decode[0] := -1
    @_ret140 := ""
    $ret23 := 0
    $note1 := load_array_str(%decode, get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & @_ret140 & "" & @_ret1110 & ".nka")
    while((($note1 # -1) and ($ret23 < $result12)) and (%decode[0] # $transition_type0)) 
      %decode[0] := -1
      @_ret140 := @_ret140 & "../"
      $note1 := load_array_str(%decode, get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & @_ret140 & @name2 & @_ret1110 & ".nka")
      inc($ret23)
    end while
    @_ret1210 := get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & @_ret140 & @_ret1110 & ".nka"
    @decode_path := @_ret1210
    %decode[0] := -1
    $_id := load_array_str(%decode, @decode_path)
    declare %development[2]
    make_persistent(%development)
    read_persistent_var(%development)
    declare @development_path
    @_ret1110 := "development"
    $transition_type0 := 22714
    @name2 := ""
    $result12 := 4
    %development[0] := -1
    @_ret140 := ""
    $ret23 := 0
    $note1 := load_array_str(%development, get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & @_ret140 & "" & @_ret1110 & ".nka")
    while((($note1 # -1) and ($ret23 < $result12)) and (%development[0] # $transition_type0)) 
      %development[0] := -1
      @_ret140 := @_ret140 & "../"
      $note1 := load_array_str(%development, get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & @_ret140 & @name2 & @_ret1110 & ".nka")
      inc($ret23)
    end while
    @_ret1210 := get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & @_ret140 & @_ret1110 & ".nka"
    @development_path := @_ret1210
    if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%decode[0] - 81202) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
      @development_path := get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & "development.nka"
    end if
    %development[0] := -1
    $_id := load_array_str(%development, @development_path)
    declare @folder_path
    @name2 := "development"
    $note1 := 22714
    @_ret1110 := ""
    $ret23 := 6
    $result12 := %development[0]
    %development[0] := -1
    @_ret1210 := ""
    $transition_type0 := 0
    $subarticulation_idx1 := load_array_str(%development, get_folder($GET_FOLDER_PATCH_DIR) & @_ret1210 & @_ret1110 & "development" & ".nka")

      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 635)
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 19)
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL, get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview))
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 0)
      set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview_solo[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HELP, "Click to solo layer " & ($i + 1))
      set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview_mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "")
      set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview_mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_mute")
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 655)
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 19)
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL, get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview))
      set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 0)
      set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview_mute[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HELP, "Click to mute layer " & ($i + 1))
      set_control_par_str(%lbl_editor_overview_action_display[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "")
      set_control_par_str(%lbl_editor_overview_action_display[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "play_animation")
      set_control_par(%lbl_editor_overview_action_display[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 615)
      set_control_par(%lbl_editor_overview_action_display[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 20)
      set_control_par(%lbl_editor_overview_action_display[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, 15)
      set_control_par(%lbl_editor_overview_action_display[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 15)
      set_control_par(%lbl_editor_overview_action_display[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL, get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview))
      set_control_par(%lbl_editor_overview_action_display[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 0)
      inc($i)
    end while

    declare ui_xy ?xy_modwheel_assignment[8] 
    set_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 10)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - 53)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) + 20)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 55)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL, get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 0)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
    set_control_par_str_arr(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_CURSOR_PICTURE, "modwheel_assignment_cursor_alpha", 2)
    set_control_par_str_arr(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_HELP, "Click and drag to adjust where on the modwheel range the subarticulation will be audible.", 2)
    set_control_par_str_arr(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_CURSOR_PICTURE, "modwheel_assignment_cursor_circle", 0)
    set_control_par_str_arr(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_CURSOR_PICTURE, "modwheel_assignment_cursor_circle", 4)
    set_control_par_str_arr(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_CURSOR_PICTURE, "modwheel_assignment_cursor_alpha", 6)
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := 0.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := 0.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[1] := 1.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := 1.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := 1.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[5] := 1.
    declare ui_label $lbl_fade_circle_md (0, 0)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "")
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "modwheel_assignment_cursor_circle_static")
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 0)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, 10)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 10)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL, get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 0)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(floor(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 10)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(floor((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, int(floor((?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0]) * 225.)))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 225)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * 224.))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]) * 224.))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 1)
    end if

    declare %lvl_mixer_channel_volume[10]
    declare ui_level_meter $lvl_mixer_channel_volume0 
    declare ui_level_meter $lvl_mixer_channel_volume1

    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%lvl_mixer_channel_volume) - 1)) 
      $allow_repetitions00 := %channel_volume_color_indices[$i / 2]
      $fade_in_range001 := 132369
      $s00 := 791839
      $fade_out_end010 := 1318181
      $fade_in_range010 := 0
      if($allow_repetitions00 = 0)
        $fade_in_range010 := $fade_in_range001
      else
        if($allow_repetitions00 = 1)
          $fade_in_range010 := $s00
        else
          $fade_in_range010 := $fade_out_end010
        end if
      end if
      $fade_in_start000 := $fade_in_range010
      $ii00 := $fade_in_start000
      set_control_par(%lvl_mixer_channel_volume[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_BG_COLOR, $ii00)
      $allow_repetitions00 := %channel_volume_color_indices[$i / 2]
      $fade_in_range001 := 132369
      $s00 := 791839
      $fade_out_end010 := 1318181
      $fade_in_range010 := 0
      if($allow_repetitions00 = 0)
        $fade_in_range010 := $fade_in_range001
      else
        if($allow_repetitions00 = 1)
          $fade_in_range010 := $s00
        else
          $fade_in_range010 := $fade_out_end010
        end if
      end if
      $fade_in_start000 := $fade_in_range010
      $ii00 := $fade_in_start000
      set_control_par(%lvl_mixer_channel_volume[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_OFF_COLOR, $ii00)
      set_control_par(%lvl_mixer_channel_volume[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_ON_COLOR, 5283791)
      set_control_par(%lvl_mixer_channel_volume[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_OVERLOAD_COLOR, 16711680)
      set_control_par(%lvl_mixer_channel_volume[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_volume[$i / 2], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 2) + (($i mod 2) * 3))
      set_control_par(%lvl_mixer_channel_volume[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_volume[$i / 2], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
      set_control_par(%lvl_mixer_channel_volume[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, 1)
      set_control_par(%lvl_mixer_channel_volume[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 126)
      set_control_par(%lvl_mixer_channel_volume[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL, %pnl_mixer_channel[$i / 2])
      set_control_par(%lvl_mixer_channel_volume[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 0)
      set_control_par(%lvl_mixer_channel_volume[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VERTICAL, 1)
      attach_level_meter(%lvl_mixer_channel_volume[$i], -1, -1, $i mod 2, $i / 2)
      set_control_par(%lvl_mixer_channel_volume[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_BG)
      inc($i)
    end while

    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_rev_disable_input), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 30)

    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_rev_disable_input), $CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 1)
    $_ret37000 := 0
    $i30100 := 1
    $note15 := 5
    while((($_ret37000 < $note15) and ($i30100 > 0)) or (($_ret37000 > $note15) and ($i30100 < 0))) 
      $subarticulation_idx7 := %microphone_position_states[$_ret37000]
      if($_ret37000 >= 4)
        $subarticulation_idx7 := %microphone_position_states[$_ret37000 + $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel]
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_channel_bleed_channel_off), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[6 * abs(sh_right(abs($subarticulation_idx7) - 1, 31))])
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_channel_bleed_channel_on), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[6 * abs(sh_right(abs($subarticulation_idx7) - 1, 31))])
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "tgl_horizontal" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($subarticulation_idx7) - 1, 31))])
      end if
      if($nki_type = 0)
        $subarticulation_idx7 := 1
        set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_enable[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      end if
      $_ret720 := abs(sh_right(abs($subarticulation_idx7) - 1, 31))
      set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$_ret720])
      set_control_par(%lbl_mixer_channel_name[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_medium[$subarticulation_idx7])
      set_control_par(%lbl_mixer_channel_out[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_button_small[6 * abs(sh_right(abs($subarticulation_idx7) - 1, 31))])
      set_control_par(%lbl_mixer_channel_rev_send[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_button_small[6 * abs(sh_right(abs($subarticulation_idx7) - 1, 31))])
      set_control_par_str(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_solo" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $subarticulation_idx7])
      set_control_par_str(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_mute" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $subarticulation_idx7])
      set_control_par_str(%sli_mixer_channel_pan[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "slider_pan" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $subarticulation_idx7])
      set_control_par_str(%sli_mixer_channel_volume[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "slider_mixer" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $subarticulation_idx7])
      set_control_par_str(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $subarticulation_idx7])
      set_control_par(%mnu_mixer_channel_out[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_button_small[6 * abs(sh_right(abs($subarticulation_idx7) - 1, 31))])
      set_control_par_str(%mnu_mixer_channel_out[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_dropdown" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $subarticulation_idx7])
      $rr1 := 0
      $is_active0100 := 1
      $ret23 := 5
      while((($rr1 < $ret23) and ($is_active0100 > 0)) or (($rr1 > $ret23) and ($is_active0100 < 0))) 
        set_control_par(%mnu_mixer_channel_out[$rr1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, 60)
        $rr1 := $rr1 + $is_active0100
      end while
      $_ret720 := $subarticulation_idx7
      set_control_par(%lvl_mixer_channel_volume[$_ret37000 * 2], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$_ret720])
      $_ret720 := $subarticulation_idx7
      set_control_par(%lvl_mixer_channel_volume[($_ret37000 * 2) + 1], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$_ret720])
      $_ret37000 := $_ret37000 + $i30100
    end while
    declare ui_panel $pnl_subarticulation_browser 
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    declare $selected_category
    declare ui_label $lbl_subarticulation_browser_category_title (0, 0)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_category_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "CATEGORY")
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_category_title), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "alpha")

    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_category_title), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, 100)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_category_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 20)

    declare ui_label $lbl_subarticulation_browser_selection_title (0, 0)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_selection_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "SUBARTICULATION")

    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_selection_title), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 730)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_selection_title), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 140)

      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_icon[$ii00], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, 25)

      set_control_par(%swi_keyswitch_search[$ii00], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(%swi_keyswitch[$ii00], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 5)

      set_control_par_str(%swi_keyswitch_purge[$ii00], $CONTROL_PAR_HELP, "Click to purge this keyswitch.")
      $ii00 := $ii00 + $iii00
    end while
    declare ui_button $btn_keyswitch_dc 
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_dc), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "")
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_dc), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "alpha")
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_dc), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, 0)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_dc), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 0)

    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_label_cover), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(%swi_keyswitch[0], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) + 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_label_cover), $CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL, get_ui_id($pnl_keyswitches))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_label_cover), $CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 0)
    $i00 := 0
    $iii00 := 1
    $ii00 := 8
    $state21 := 0
    while(((($i00 < $ii00) and ($iii00 > 0)) or (($i00 > $ii00) and ($iii00 < 0))) and ($state21 = 0)) 
      if(%_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $i00] = 1)
        $selected_keyswitch := $i00
        $state21 := 1
        continue
      end if
      $i00 := $i00 + $iii00
    end while
    declare $keyswitch_loading_animation := 0
    declare %lbl_keyswitch_loading_animation[8]
    declare ui_label $lbl_keyswitch_loading_animation0 (0, 0)
    declare ui_label $lbl_keyswitch_loading_animation1 (0, 0)
    declare ui_label $lbl_keyswitch_loading_animation2 (0, 0)
    declare ui_label $lbl_keyswitch_loading_animation3 (0, 0)
    declare ui_label $lbl_keyswitch_loading_animation4 (0, 0)
    declare ui_label $lbl_keyswitch_loading_animation5 (0, 0)
    declare ui_label $lbl_keyswitch_loading_animation6 (0, 0)
    declare ui_label $lbl_keyswitch_loading_animation7 (0, 0)
    $_iter0 := 0
    while($_iter0 <= 7) 
      %lbl_keyswitch_loading_animation[$_iter0] := get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_loading_animation0) + $_iter0
      inc($_iter0)
    end while
    $state21 := 0
    $ii00 := 1
    $iii00 := 8
    while((($state21 < $iii00) and ($ii00 > 0)) or (($state21 > $iii00) and ($ii00 < 0))) 
      set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch_loading_animation[$state21], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "")
      set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch_loading_animation[$state21], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "lbl_ks_loading_animation")
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_loading_animation[$state21], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_icon[$state21], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_loading_animation[$state21], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_icon[$state21], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_loading_animation[$state21], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, 35)
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_loading_animation[$state21], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, 35)
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_loading_animation[$state21], $CONTROL_PAR_PARENT_PANEL, get_ui_id($pnl_keyswitches))
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_loading_animation[$state21], $CONTROL_PAR_Z_LAYER, 0)
      $state21 := $state21 + $ii00
    end while
    $instrument_slot5 := 0
    $keyswitch16 := 1
    $note16 := 8
    while((($instrument_slot5 < $note16) and ($keyswitch16 > 0)) or (($instrument_slot5 > $note16) and ($keyswitch16 < 0))) 
      set_control_par(%swi_keyswitch[$instrument_slot5], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5])
      set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch_note_name[$instrument_slot5], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !midi_note_names[$instrument_slot5 + ($keyswitch_octave * 12)])
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_note_name[$instrument_slot5], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[(6 * abs(sh_right(abs(%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5]) - 1, 31))) + (%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5] * %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5])])
      set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch[$instrument_slot5], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "          ")
      set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch[$instrument_slot5], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, "          ")
      set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch[$instrument_slot5], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, !_articulation_names[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5])
      if(%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5] = 1)
        set_control_par_str(%swi_keyswitch[$instrument_slot5], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_ks_purge_search")
      else
        set_control_par_str(%swi_keyswitch[$instrument_slot5], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_ks_disabled")
      end if
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch[$instrument_slot5], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_articulation_tile[(6 * abs(sh_right(abs(%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5]) - 1, 31))) + (%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5] * %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5])])
      $note0 := $instrument_slot5
      set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch_icon[$note0], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, !articulation_icon_states[(2 * abs(sh_right(abs(%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $note0]) - 1, 31))) + (%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $note0] * %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $note0])])
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_icon[$note0], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %_articulation_icon[($selected_instrument * 8) + $note0])
      set_control_par(%swi_keyswitch_purge[$instrument_slot5], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5])
      set_key_pressed(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $instrument_slot5, %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5] * abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($nki_type - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)))
      $instrument_slot5 := $instrument_slot5 + $keyswitch16
    end while
    $lowest1 := 128
    $highest1 := 0
    $i7 := 0
    while($i7 <= 0) 
      $i351 := $i7
      $_step2501 := 128
      $_stop2501 := 0
      $ii9 := 0
      $iii2 := 0
      while($iii2 <= 7) 
        if(%_keyswitch_states[($i351 * 8) + $iii2] = 1)
          $ii9 := 0
          while($ii9 <= 3) 
            if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)] >= 0)
              if((%subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] * 12)) < $_step2501)
                $_step2501 := %subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] * 12)
              end if
              if((%subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] * 12)) > $_stop2501)
                $_stop2501 := %subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] * 12)
              end if
            end if
            inc($ii9)
          end while
        end if
        inc($iii2)
      end while
      %_instrument_range[$i351 * 2] := ($_step2501 - $range_offset_lower) - (%octave_shift[$i351] * 12)
      %_instrument_range[($i351 * 2) + 1] := ($_stop2501 + $range_offset_upper) - (%octave_shift[$i351] * 12)
      $lowest1 := $lowest1 - (($lowest1 - %_instrument_range[$i7 * 2]) .and. sh_right(%_instrument_range[$i7 * 2] - $lowest1, 31))
      $highest1 := $highest1 - (($highest1 - %_instrument_range[($i7 * 2) + 1]) .and. sh_right($highest1 - %_instrument_range[($i7 * 2) + 1], 31))
      inc($i7)
    end while
    %nki_range[0] := $lowest1 - (($lowest1 - (($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8)) .and. sh_right($lowest1 - (($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8), 31))
    %nki_range[1] := $highest1
    $ret23 := 0
    while($ret23 <= 127) 
      set_key_color($ret23, $KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE)
      if(($ret23 >= %nki_range[0]) and ($ret23 <= %nki_range[1]))
        set_key_color($ret23, $KEY_COLOR_BLUE)
      end if
      inc($ret23)
    end while
    $i := 0
    while($i <= 7) 
      set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_RED)
      if(%_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $i] = 1)
        set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_ORANGE)
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    $selected_subarticulation := 0
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      if($nki_type # 0)
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_bg_upper), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "bg_upper_editor")
      end if
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_velocity_to_modwheel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_mw_to_velocity[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_humanize), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_humanization[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
      if(%_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] >= 0)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_big")
        $btn_articulation_release := 0
      else
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Release")
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_big_disabled")
        $btn_articulation_release := 1
      end if
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
        set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(round(real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) + (real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.) - int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) * pow(real($i) / real(num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope)), (real(%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 100.) + 1.)))))
        set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
        $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 0
      else
        if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
          $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 1
        else
          if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
            $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 2
          else
            if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
              $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 3
            else
              if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
                $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 4
              else
                $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 5
              end if
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
      $allow_repetitions00 := $selected_subarticulation
      $fade_in_start000 := 0
      while($fade_in_start000 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
        if($fade_in_start000 # $allow_repetitions00)
          set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$fade_in_start000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$fade_in_start000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        end if
        inc($fade_in_start000)
      end while
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
        $displayed_subarticulation := $selected_subarticulation
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    " & !subarticulations_display_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]])
        else
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    Empty")
        end if
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_solo_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_solo_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mute_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_mute_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $selected_subarticulation)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_volume[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])

            end while
          else
            if($result12 = 1)
              $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_browse_page)
              $note15 := 0
              while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
                set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
                inc($note15)
              end while
            else
              if($result12 = 2)
                $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_editor_page)
                $note15 := 0
                while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
                  set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
                  inc($note15)
                end while
              else
                if($result12 = 3)
                  $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_mixer_page)
                  $note15 := 0
                  while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
                    set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
                    inc($note15)
                  end while
                end if
              end if
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_instrument_selector), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_instrument_name_ensemble), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_instrument_name), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !instrument_name[%loaded_instrument_types[0]])
    declare @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH
    @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH := @folder_path & "legato data/"
    declare @REVERB_PRESET_PATH
    @REVERB_PRESET_PATH := @folder_path & "mixer data/reverb presets/"
    declare %i22[100]
    declare %_step460[100]
    declare %_stop460[100]
    declare !path4[100]
    declare !_ret150[100]
    declare %ii2[100]
    declare %_step450[100]
    declare %_stop450[100]
    declare %check_before0[100]
    declare %changed0[100]
    declare %inst0[100]
    declare %ks1[100]
    declare %event2[100]
    declare %_longs_in_new_keyswitches0[100]
    declare %inst2[100]
    declare %_step530[100]
    declare %_stop530[100]
    declare %ks5[100]
    declare %_step520[100]
    declare %_stop520[100]
    declare %subart0[100]
    declare %_step511[100]
    declare %_stop511[100]
    declare %_short_circuit10[100]
    declare %_ret530[100]
    declare %_stop540[100]
    declare %_short_circuit20[100]
    declare %_sc_temp00[100]
    declare %_ret540[100]
    declare %_ret550[100]
    declare %subarticulation_is_loaded0[512]
    declare %idx40[100]
    declare %inst4[100]
    declare %_step660[100]
    declare %_stop660[100]
    declare !label0[100]
    declare %idx41[100]
    declare %idx42[100]
    declare !___print_string1[100]
    declare %i48[100]
    declare %_step680[100]
    declare %_stop680[100]
    declare %idx43[100]
    declare %selected_subart_buffer0[100]
    declare !release_mod_names0[2]
    declare %abort0[100]
    declare %i53[100]
    declare %idx44[100]
    declare %string_type0[100]
    declare %con_sordino_lf_freq0[5]
    declare %con_sordino_lf_gain0[5]
    declare %con_sordino_lmf_freq0[5]
    declare %con_sordino_lmf_gain0[5]
    declare %con_sordino_hf_freq0[5]
    declare %con_sordino_hf_gain0[5]
    declare %con_sordino_gain0[5]
    declare %i54[100]
    declare %_step720[100]
    declare %_stop720[100]
    declare %con_sordino_idx0[100]
    declare %_ret1120[100]
    declare %_ret1130[100]
    declare %_ret1140[100]
    declare %_ret1150[100]
    declare %_ret1160[100]
    declare %_ret1170[100]

    declare %_ret1190[100]

    declare !preset_path0[100]
    declare %selected_instrument_before0[100]
    declare %inst5[100]

    declare %_step770[100]
    declare %_stop770[100]

    declare %new_idx0[100]
    declare !path8[100]

    declare %tmp310[100]
    declare %current_idx2[100]

function get_currently_opened_ks_instrument_name
  $i351 := 0
  while($i351 = 0) 
    $iii2 := 0
    $_step2501 := 0
    while($_step2501 = 0) 
      if($nki_type = 0)
        $_stop2501 := $selected_instrument
        $_step2501 := 1
        continue
      end if
      $_stop2501 := %loaded_instrument_types[0]
      $_step2501 := 1
      continue
    end while
    $iii2 := $_stop2501
    if($iii2 # -1)
      @ret2 := !instrument_name[$iii2]
      $i351 := 1
      continue
    else
      @ret2 := "Unknown Instrument"
      $i351 := 1
      continue
    end if
  end while
end function
function get_currently_opened_instrument_idx
  $_step2501 := 0
  while($_step2501 = 0) 
    if($nki_type = 0)
      $_stop2501 := $selected_instrument
      $_step2501 := 1
      continue
    end if
    $_stop2501 := %loaded_instrument_types[0]
    $_step2501 := 1
    continue
  end while
end function
function Bitlist____set_range
  %Bitlist____val[$i42] := (- sh_right(abs($ii50 - 1) - 1, 31) * ((- sh_right(abs(($modulation1 - $fade_out_range01) - 32) - 1, 31) * -1) + (%Bitlist____val[$i42] .or. sh_left(.not. sh_left(-1, $modulation1 - $fade_out_range01), 32 - $modulation1)))) + (- sh_right(abs($ii50) - 1, 31) * (- sh_right(($modulation1 - $fade_out_range01) - 32, 31) * (%Bitlist____val[$i42] .and. .not. sh_left(.not. sh_left(-1, $modulation1 - $fade_out_range01), 32 - $modulation1))))
end function
function Floatmask____set_range
  $i42 := %_Floatmask____fm[$ii5 * 2]
  $fade_out_range01 := 32 - ((32 - $i41) .and. sh_right($i41 - 32, 31))
  $modulation1 := 32 - ((32 - $octave_event0) .and. sh_right($octave_event0 - 32, 31))
  $ii50 := $_stop28000
  call Bitlist____set_range
  $i42 := %_Floatmask____fm[($ii5 * 2) + 1]
  $fade_out_range01 := (32 - ((32 - $i41) .and. sh_right(32 - $i41, 31))) - 32
  $modulation1 := (32 - ((32 - $octave_event0) .and. sh_right(32 - $octave_event0, 31))) - 32
  $ii50 := $_stop28000
  call Bitlist____set_range
end function
function Floatmask____set
  %Bitlist____val[%_Floatmask____fm[($i3010 * 2) + ($trigger_clear010 / 32)]] := (%Bitlist____val[%_Floatmask____fm[($i3010 * 2) + ($trigger_clear010 / 32)]] .and. .not. sh_left(1, (31 - $trigger_clear010) mod 32)) .or. sh_left($i29010, (31 - $trigger_clear010) mod 32)
end function
function update_keyswitch_selection
  $instrument_slot5 := 0
  $keyswitch16 := 1
  $note16 := 8
  while((($instrument_slot5 < $note16) and ($keyswitch16 > 0)) or (($instrument_slot5 > $note16) and ($keyswitch16 < 0))) 
    set_control_par(%swi_keyswitch[$instrument_slot5], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5])
    set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch_note_name[$instrument_slot5], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !midi_note_names[$instrument_slot5 + ($keyswitch_octave * 12)])
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_note_name[$instrument_slot5], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[(6 * abs(sh_right(abs(%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5]) - 1, 31))) + (%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5] * %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5])])
    set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch[$instrument_slot5], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "          ")
    set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch[$instrument_slot5], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, "          ")
    set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch[$instrument_slot5], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXTLINE, !_articulation_names[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5])
    if(%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5] = 1)
      set_control_par_str(%swi_keyswitch[$instrument_slot5], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_ks_purge_search")
    else
      set_control_par_str(%swi_keyswitch[$instrument_slot5], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_ks_disabled")
    end if
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch[$instrument_slot5], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_articulation_tile[(6 * abs(sh_right(abs(%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5]) - 1, 31))) + (%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5] * %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5])])
    $note0 := $instrument_slot5
    set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch_icon[$note0], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, !articulation_icon_states[(2 * abs(sh_right(abs(%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $note0]) - 1, 31))) + (%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $note0] * %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $note0])])
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_icon[$note0], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %_articulation_icon[($selected_instrument * 8) + $note0])
    set_control_par(%swi_keyswitch_purge[$instrument_slot5], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5])
    set_key_pressed(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $instrument_slot5, %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $instrument_slot5] * abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($nki_type - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)))
    $instrument_slot5 := $instrument_slot5 + $keyswitch16
  end while
  $lowest1 := 128
  $highest1 := 0
  $i7 := 0
  while($i7 <= 0) 
    $i351 := $i7
    $_step2501 := 128
    $_stop2501 := 0
    $ii9 := 0
    $iii2 := 0
    while($iii2 <= 7) 
      if(%_keyswitch_states[($i351 * 8) + $iii2] = 1)
        $ii9 := 0
        while($ii9 <= 3) 
          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)] >= 0)
            if((%subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] * 12)) < $_step2501)
              $_step2501 := %subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] * 12)
            end if
            if((%subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] * 12)) > $_stop2501)
              $_stop2501 := %subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] * 12)
            end if
          end if
          inc($ii9)
        end while
      end if
      inc($iii2)
    end while
    %_instrument_range[$i351 * 2] := ($_step2501 - $range_offset_lower) - (%octave_shift[$i351] * 12)
    %_instrument_range[($i351 * 2) + 1] := ($_stop2501 + $range_offset_upper) - (%octave_shift[$i351] * 12)
    $lowest1 := $lowest1 - (($lowest1 - %_instrument_range[$i7 * 2]) .and. sh_right(%_instrument_range[$i7 * 2] - $lowest1, 31))
    $highest1 := $highest1 - (($highest1 - %_instrument_range[($i7 * 2) + 1]) .and. sh_right($highest1 - %_instrument_range[($i7 * 2) + 1], 31))
    inc($i7)
  end while
  %nki_range[0] := $lowest1 - (($lowest1 - (($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8)) .and. sh_right($lowest1 - (($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8), 31))
  %nki_range[1] := $highest1
  $ret23 := 0
  while($ret23 <= 127) 
    set_key_color($ret23, $KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE)
    if(($ret23 >= %nki_range[0]) and ($ret23 <= %nki_range[1]))
      set_key_color($ret23, $KEY_COLOR_BLUE)
    end if
    inc($ret23)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 7) 
    set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_RED)
    if(%_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $i] = 1)
      set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_ORANGE)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  $selected_subarticulation := 0
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    if($nki_type # 0)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_bg_upper), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "bg_upper_editor")
    end if
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_velocity_to_modwheel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_mw_to_velocity[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_humanize), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_humanization[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
    if(%_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] >= 0)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_big")
      $btn_articulation_release := 0
    else
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Release")
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_big_disabled")
      $btn_articulation_release := 1
    end if
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(round(real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) + (real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.) - int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) * pow(real($i) / real(num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope)), (real(%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 100.) + 1.)))))
      set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
      inc($i)
    end while
    if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
      $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 0
    else
      if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
        $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 1
      else
        if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
          $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 2
        else
          if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
            $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 3
          else
            if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
              $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 4
            else
              $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 5
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    $allow_repetitions00 := $selected_subarticulation
    $fade_in_start000 := 0
    while($fade_in_start000 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
      if($fade_in_start000 # $allow_repetitions00)
        set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$fade_in_start000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$fade_in_start000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      end if
      inc($fade_in_start000)
    end while
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
      $displayed_subarticulation := $selected_subarticulation
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    " & !subarticulations_display_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]])
      else
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    Empty")
      end if
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_solo_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_solo_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mute_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_mute_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $selected_subarticulation)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_volume[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 4)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      $subarticulation1 := 0
      $articulation_event_id4 := 1
      $fade_out_range0 := num_elements(%btn_editor_overview)
      while((($subarticulation1 < $fade_out_range0) and ($articulation_event_id4 > 0)) or (($subarticulation1 > $fade_out_range0) and ($articulation_event_id4 < 0))) 
        if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $subarticulation1)] # -1)
          set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$subarticulation1], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_display_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $subarticulation1)]]])
        else
          set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$subarticulation1], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Empty")
        end if
        $subarticulation1 := $subarticulation1 + $articulation_event_id4
      end while
      if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        $i30100 := 0
        $_ret37000 := 1
        $result7 := 4

        $i40 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
        $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($i40 - (($min_idx0 * $i40) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($i40 - (($min_idx0 * $i40) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($i40 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $i40))
        $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($i40 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $i40
        $i := 0
        while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
            set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_display_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
            if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
              set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
            else
              set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
            end if
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
          end if
          inc($i)
        end while
        if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
end function
function editor_page_open
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  if($nki_type # 0)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_bg_upper), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "bg_upper_editor")
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_velocity_to_modwheel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_mw_to_velocity[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_humanize), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_humanization[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  if(%_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] >= 0)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_release[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_big")
    $btn_articulation_release := 0
  else
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Release")
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_articulation_release_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_articulation_release), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_big_disabled")
    $btn_articulation_release := 1
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(round(real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) + (real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.) - int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) * pow(real($i) / real(num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope)), (real(%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 100.) + 1.)))))
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
    inc($i)
  end while
  if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
    $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 0
  else
    if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 40))
      $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 1
    else
      if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 5) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
        $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 2
      else
        if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
          $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 3
        else
          if(((%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127) and (%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 127)) and (%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] = 0))
            $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 4
          else
            $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 5
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
  $allow_repetitions00 := $selected_subarticulation
  $fade_in_start000 := 0
  while($fade_in_start000 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
    if($fade_in_start000 # $allow_repetitions00)
      set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$fade_in_start000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    else
      set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$fade_in_start000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    end if
    inc($fade_in_start000)
  end while
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  end if
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    $displayed_subarticulation := $selected_subarticulation
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    " & !subarticulations_display_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]])
    else
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    Empty")
    end if
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_solo_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_solo_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mute_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_mute_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $selected_subarticulation)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_volume[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 4)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    $subarticulation1 := 0
    $articulation_event_id4 := 1
    $fade_out_range0 := num_elements(%btn_editor_overview)
    while((($subarticulation1 < $fade_out_range0) and ($articulation_event_id4 > 0)) or (($subarticulation1 > $fade_out_range0) and ($articulation_event_id4 < 0))) 
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $subarticulation1)] # -1)
        set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$subarticulation1], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_display_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $subarticulation1)]]])
      else
        set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$subarticulation1], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Empty")
      end if
      $subarticulation1 := $subarticulation1 + $articulation_event_id4
    end while
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      $i30100 := 0
      $_ret37000 := 1
      $result7 := 4
      while((($i30100 < $result7) and ($_ret37000 > 0)) or (($i30100 > $result7) and ($_ret37000 < 0))) 
        set_control_par(%lbl_editor_overview_action_display[$i30100], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[1 + sh_right(abs(%_articulation_subarticulation_is_playing[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i30100)]) - 1, 31)])
        $i30100 := $i30100 + $_ret37000
      end while
    end if
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_repetition_speed_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_rr_mode_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 0) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 5))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_tightness[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      $mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode := %_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_rr_mode_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 2) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 9))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_volume[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "slider_large")
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[0])
      $btn_subarticulation_trans_speed := %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed_auto[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      if($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed = 1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "slider_large_disabled")
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[6])
      end if
    end if
  end if
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      if($i = $selected_subarticulation)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      $note1 := %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $is_active0100 := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $result12 := int(round((real($note1) / 127.) * real(31 + (sh_right($note1 - 32, 31) + 1))))
      $transition_type0 := int((real($is_active0100) / 127.) * 31.)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %center_circles_frame_sums[$result12] + $transition_type0)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $note1)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $is_active0100)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(floor(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 10)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(floor((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, int(floor((?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0]) * 225.)))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 225)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 1)
  end if
  ?xy_dynamic_range[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  ?xy_dynamic_range[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[0] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 10)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 1)

  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  $subarticulation_idx1 := int((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * (1. - (real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage) / 100.))) + ((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage)) / 100.))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 1) + int((real((($subarticulation_idx1 * (1 + (sh_right(127 - $subarticulation_idx1, 31) .or. sh_right($subarticulation_idx1 - 1, 31)))) - sh_right($subarticulation_idx1 - 1, 31)) - (127 * sh_right(127 - $subarticulation_idx1, 31))) / 127.) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))))
end function

  $_iter80020 := %Browser____categories[$browser]
  $i3010 := %Categories____tags[$_iter80020]

  $i29010 := 1

end function
