function update_all_ranges
  $lowest1 := 128
  $highest1 := 0
  $i7 := 0
  while($i7 <= 0) 
    $i351 := $i7
    $_step2501 := 128
    $_stop2501 := 0
    $ii9 := 0
    $iii2 := 0
    while($iii2 <= 7) 
      if(%_keyswitch_states[($i351 * 8) + $iii2] = 1)
        $ii9 := 0
        while($ii9 <= 3) 
          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)] >= 0)
            if((%subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] * 12)) < $_step2501)
              $_step2501 := %subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] * 12)
            end if
            if((%subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] * 12)) > $_stop2501)
              $_stop2501 := %subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] + (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i351 * 32) + (($iii2 * 4) + $ii9)]]] * 12)
            end if
          end if
          inc($ii9)
        end while
      end if
      inc($iii2)
    end while
    %_instrument_range[$i351 * 2] := ($_step2501 - $range_offset_lower) - (%octave_shift[$i351] * 12)
    %_instrument_range[($i351 * 2) + 1] := ($_stop2501 + $range_offset_upper) - (%octave_shift[$i351] * 12)
    $lowest1 := $lowest1 - (($lowest1 - %_instrument_range[$i7 * 2]) .and. sh_right(%_instrument_range[$i7 * 2] - $lowest1, 31))
    $highest1 := $highest1 - (($highest1 - %_instrument_range[($i7 * 2) + 1]) .and. sh_right($highest1 - %_instrument_range[($i7 * 2) + 1], 31))
    inc($i7)
  end while
  %nki_range[0] := $lowest1 - (($lowest1 - (($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8)) .and. sh_right($lowest1 - (($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8), 31))
  %nki_range[1] := $highest1
  $ret23 := 0
  while($ret23 <= 127) 
    set_key_color($ret23, $KEY_COLOR_INACTIVE)
    if(($ret23 >= %nki_range[0]) and ($ret23 <= %nki_range[1]))
      set_key_color($ret23, $KEY_COLOR_BLUE)
    end if
    inc($ret23)
  end while
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 7) 
    set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_RED)
    if(%_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $i] = 1)
      set_key_color(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i, $KEY_COLOR_ORANGE)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function update_minimal_delays
  $subarticulation_idx2 := 0
  $note2 := 0
  while($note2 <= 0) 
    $subarticulation_idx2 := 0
    while($subarticulation_idx2 <= 7) 
      $min5 := $note2
      $idx38 := $subarticulation_idx2
      %_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] := 0
      $transition_type1 := 0
      while($transition_type1 <= 3) 
        if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($min5 * 32) + (($idx38 * 4) + $transition_type1)] # -1)
          if(%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($min5 * 32) + (($idx38 * 4) + $transition_type1)]]] = 2)
            %_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] := %_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] - ((%_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] - $lookahead) .and. sh_right(%_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] - $lookahead, 31))
          else
            %_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] := %_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] - ((%_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] - %subarticulations_start_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($min5 * 32) + (($idx38 * 4) + $transition_type1)]]]) .and. sh_right(%_articulation_minimal_delay[($min5 * 8) + $idx38] - %subarticulations_start_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($min5 * 32) + (($idx38 * 4) + $transition_type1)]]], 31))
          end if
        end if
        inc($transition_type1)
      end while
      inc($subarticulation_idx2)
    end while
    inc($note2)
  end while
end function

function Floatmask______init__
  $Floatmask____free_idx := search(%Floatmask____allocation, 0, $Floatmask____free_idx, 499999)
  if($Floatmask____free_idx = -1)
    message("Error: No more free space available to allocate objects of type 'Floatmask'")
  end if
  %Floatmask____allocation[$Floatmask____free_idx] := 1
  $string000 := %_Floatmask____fm[$Floatmask____free_idx * 2]
  $_stop28000 := 1
  $octave_event0 := $string000
  while($octave_event0 # -1) 
    $i41 := 0

    if(%Bitlist____allocation[$octave_event0] > 0)

      %Bitlist____allocation[$octave_event0] := 0
    end if

    $reduced_note000 := 0
    if($_ret9500 # -1)
      %Bitlist____val[$_ret9500] := 0
      $Bitlist____free_idx := (($Bitlist____free_idx + $_ret9500) - abs($Bitlist____free_idx - $_ret9500)) / 2
    end if
  end while
  $Bitlist____free_idx := search(%Bitlist____allocation, 0, $Bitlist____free_idx, 999999)
  if($Bitlist____free_idx = -1)
    message("Error: No more free space available to allocate objects of type 'Bitlist'")
  end if
  %Bitlist____allocation[$Bitlist____free_idx] := 1
  %Bitlist____val[$Bitlist____free_idx] := 0
  $ii50 := $Bitlist____free_idx
  %_Floatmask____fm[$Floatmask____free_idx * 2] := $ii50
  $_ret950 := %_Floatmask____fm[$Floatmask____free_idx * 2]
  $reduced_note00 := 1
  if($_ret950 # -1)
    %Bitlist____allocation[$_ret950] := %Bitlist____allocation[$_ret950] + $reduced_note00
  end if
  $string000 := %_Floatmask____fm[($Floatmask____free_idx * 2) + 1]
  $_stop28000 := 1
  $octave_event0 := $string000
  while($octave_event0 # -1) 
    $i41 := 0
    %Bitlist____allocation[$octave_event0] := %Bitlist____allocation[$octave_event0] - $_stop28000
    if(%Bitlist____allocation[$octave_event0] > 0)
      $octave_event0 := -1
      continue
    else

    end if

  $ii50 := $Bitlist____free_idx

function Floatmask____get_range
  $highest1 := 0
  call Floatmask______init__
  $highest1 := $i46
  %Bitlist____val[%_Floatmask____fm[$highest1 * 2]] := (- sh_right(abs(((32 - ((32 - $lowest00) .and. sh_right($lowest00 - 32, 31))) - (32 - ((32 - $subarticulation_event_id3) .and. sh_right($subarticulation_event_id3 - 32, 31)))) - 32) - 1, 31) * %Bitlist____val[%_Floatmask____fm[$i800 * 2]]) + sh_left(sh_right(%Bitlist____val[%_Floatmask____fm[$i800 * 2]], 32 - (32 - ((32 - $lowest00) .and. sh_right($lowest00 - 32, 31)))) .and. .not. sh_left(-1, (32 - ((32 - $lowest00) .and. sh_right($lowest00 - 32, 31))) - (32 - ((32 - $subarticulation_event_id3) .and. sh_right($subarticulation_event_id3 - 32, 31)))), 32 - (32 - ((32 - $lowest00) .and. sh_right($lowest00 - 32, 31))))
  %Bitlist____val[%_Floatmask____fm[($highest1 * 2) + 1]] := (- sh_right(abs((((32 - ((32 - $lowest00) .and. sh_right(32 - $lowest00, 31))) - 32) - ((32 - ((32 - $subarticulation_event_id3) .and. sh_right(32 - $subarticulation_event_id3, 31))) - 32)) - 32) - 1, 31) * %Bitlist____val[%_Floatmask____fm[($i800 * 2) + 1]]) + sh_left(sh_right(%Bitlist____val[%_Floatmask____fm[($i800 * 2) + 1]], 32 - ((32 - ((32 - $lowest00) .and. sh_right(32 - $lowest00, 31))) - 32)) .and. .not. sh_left(-1, ((32 - ((32 - $lowest00) .and. sh_right(32 - $lowest00, 31))) - 32) - ((32 - ((32 - $subarticulation_event_id3) .and. sh_right(32 - $subarticulation_event_id3, 31))) - 32)), 32 - ((32 - ((32 - $lowest00) .and. sh_right(32 - $lowest00, 31))) - 32))
  $_step28000 := $highest1
end function

        set_control_par(%_lbl_preset_info[($idx33000 * 9) + $next_free_idx0000], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)

        if($event0 = $i38)
          set_control_par(%_btn_preset[($i290 * 9) + $_ret370000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
          set_control_par(%_lbl_preset_name[($i290 * 9) + $_ret370000], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %BrowserFont__preset[1])
          set_control_par_str(%_lbl_preset_info[($i290 * 9) + $_ret370000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, !articulation_icon_states[1])

      set_control_par(%_btn_preset[($i290 * 9) + $_ret370000], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$i290200])

function articulation_event_clear
  $output_type0 := 0
  if($instrument1 # -1)
    $output_type0 := 0
    while($output_type0 <= 3) 
      %_articulation_event_list[($instrument1 * 4) + $output_type0] := -1
      inc($output_type0)
    end while
    %articulation_event_instrument[$instrument1] := -1
    %articulation_event_keyswitch[$instrument1] := -1
    %articulation_event_note[$instrument1] := -1
    %articulation_event_timestamp[$instrument1] := -1
  end if
end function
function articulation_event_is_event_active
  $is_active0 := 0
  $i30 := 0
  $trigger_clear0 := -1
  if($articulation_event_id1 >= 0)
    $i30 := 0
    while($i30 <= 3) 
      if(%_articulation_event_list[($articulation_event_id1 * 4) + $i30] # -1)
        if(%_articulation_event_list[($articulation_event_id1 * 4) + $i30] = -999)
          $is_active0 := 1
          $trigger_clear0 := 0
        else
          if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[%_articulation_event_list[($articulation_event_id1 * 4) + $i30]] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
            $is_active0 := 1
            $trigger_clear0 := 0
          else
            if(%_articulation_event_list[($articulation_event_id1 * 4) + $i30] >= 0)
              if($trigger_clear0 = -1)
                $trigger_clear0 := 1
              end if
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
      inc($i30)
    end while
  end if
  if($trigger_clear0 = 1)
    $instrument1 := $articulation_event_id1
    call articulation_event_clear
  end if
  $ret19 := $is_active0
end function

end function
function delay_buffer_add
  $_iter801502 := search(%delay_buffer, -1)
  if($_iter801502 # -1)
    %delay_buffer[$_iter801502] := $_iter91060
    %delay_buffer_instrument[$_iter801502] := $_iter801060
    %delay_buffer_keyswitch[$_iter801502] := $_iter910402
    %delay_buffer_subarticulation[$_iter801502] := $_iter8010402
    %delay_buffer_note[$_iter801502] := $EXIT_FLAG261002
    %delay_buffer_velo[$_iter801502] := $current_filtermethod002
    %delay_buffer_interval[$_iter801502] := $tmp0002
    %delay_buffer_countdown[$_iter801502] := $ret50102
    %delay_buffer_prev_note[$_iter801502] := $current002102
    $any_delay_event_queued := 1
    $delay_buffer_highest_idx := $delay_buffer_highest_idx - (($delay_buffer_highest_idx - $_iter801502) .and. sh_right($delay_buffer_highest_idx - $_iter801502, 31))
  else
    message("WARNING: Delay Buffer Full")
  end if
end function

end function
function note_to_string
  $_stop2501 := 0
  $_step2501 := ($i351 - %instrument_lowest_string[%loaded_instrument_types[$iii2]]) - $mnu_finger_position
  if($_step2501 > 0)
    $_stop2501 := $_step2501 / %instrument_string_interval[%loaded_instrument_types[$iii2]]
  else
    $_stop2501 := 0
  end if
  $_stop2501 := $_stop2501 - (($_stop2501 - (%instrument_number_of_strings[%loaded_instrument_types[$iii2]] - 1)) .and. sh_right((%instrument_number_of_strings[%loaded_instrument_types[$iii2]] - 1) - $_stop2501, 31))
  $ii9 := $_stop2501
end function
function event_list_add_articulation_event
  %_event_list[($cc_value110 * 1024) + (($transition_idx000 * 128) + $subart_slot100)] := $idx4600
  %articulation_event_instrument[$idx4600] := $cc_value110
  %articulation_event_keyswitch[$idx4600] := $transition_idx000
  %articulation_event_note[$idx4600] := $subart_slot100
  %articulation_event_timestamp[$idx4600] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
end function
function articulations_note_off

  $highest1 := 0

    $lowest00 := 0
    while($lowest00 <= 3)

        end if

          %_murmation_active[($i7 * 32) + (($highest1 * 4) + $lowest00)] := 0
        end if
        $_step28000 := 0

        $_stop28000 := $result10

          $_step28000 := 1

            $_step28000 := 1

        if($_step28000 = 1)

function update_selected_notes

          case 0
            $s00 := 1
          case 1

          case 2

function subarticulation_reacts_to_modwheel
  $highest00 := 0
  if($ks00 >= 0)
    if(%subarticulation_type_behavior_list[%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$ks00]]] = 1)
      $highest00 := 1
    end if
  end if
  $s00 := $highest00
end function
function subarticulation_event_set_event_id
  %subarticulation_event_list[$_iter8016003] := $_iter80030002
end function
function subarticulation_event_fade_out
  if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[$EXIT_FLAG261002] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
    fade_out(%subarticulation_event_list[$EXIT_FLAG261002], $_iter8010402 * 1000, $_iter910402)
    if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$EXIT_FLAG261002] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
      fade_out(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$EXIT_FLAG261002], $_iter8010402 * 1000, $_iter910402)
    end if
    if(%subarticulation_event_transition_event_id[$EXIT_FLAG261002] # -1)
      fade_out(%subarticulation_event_transition_event_id[$EXIT_FLAG261002], $_iter8010402 * 1000, $_iter910402)
    end if
    if(%subarticulation_event_transition_octave_event_id[$EXIT_FLAG261002] # -1)
      fade_out(%subarticulation_event_transition_octave_event_id[$EXIT_FLAG261002], $_iter8010402 * 1000, $_iter910402)
    end if
    if($_iter910402 = 1)
      $_iter8016003 := $EXIT_FLAG261002
      $_iter80030002 := -1
      call subarticulation_event_set_event_id
    end if
  end if
end function
function trigger_ks_fade
  $ks_fade_time := %note5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
  %event2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  $allow_repetitions00 := 0
  $fade_in_range001 := 0
  $fade_out_end010 := 1
  $fade_in_range010 := num_elements(%found_shared_legatos)
  while((($fade_in_range001 < $fade_in_range010) and ($fade_out_end010 > 0)) or (($fade_in_range001 > $fade_in_range010) and ($fade_out_end010 < 0))) 
    %found_shared_legatos[$fade_in_range001] := $allow_repetitions00
    $fade_in_range001 := $fade_in_range001 + $fade_out_end010
  end while
  $allow_repetitions00 := 0
  $fade_in_range001 := 0
  $fade_out_end010 := 1
  $fade_in_range010 := num_elements(%_any_longs)
  while((($fade_in_range001 < $fade_in_range010) and ($fade_out_end010 > 0)) or (($fade_in_range001 > $fade_in_range010) and ($fade_out_end010 < 0))) 
    %_any_longs[$fade_in_range001] := $allow_repetitions00
    $fade_in_range001 := $fade_in_range001 + $fade_out_end010
  end while
  $_iter17 := 0
  while($_iter17 <= 0) 
    %_longs_in_new_keyswitches0[($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) + $_iter17] := 0
    inc($_iter17)
  end while
  %inst2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %_step530[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
  %_stop530[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
  while(((%inst2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < %_stop530[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%_step530[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > 0)) or ((%inst2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > %_stop530[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%_step530[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0))) 
    %_longs_in_new_keyswitches0[($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) + %inst2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := 0
    %ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    %_step520[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
    %_stop520[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 8
    while(((%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < %_stop520[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%_step520[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > 0)) or ((%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > %_stop520[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%_step520[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0))) 
      if(%_keyswitch_states[(%inst2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] = 1)
        %subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        %_step511[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
        %_stop511[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 4
        while(((%subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < %_stop511[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%_step511[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > 0)) or ((%subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > %_stop511[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%_step511[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0))) 
          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[(%inst2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])] >= 0)
            %_short_circuit10[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            $ks00 := %_loaded_subarticulations[(%inst2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])]
            call subarticulation_reacts_to_modwheel
            %_ret530[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $s00
            if(%_ret530[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = 1)
              if(%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[(%inst2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])]]] # 10)
                %_short_circuit10[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
              end if
            end if
            if(%_short_circuit10[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = 1)
              %_longs_in_new_keyswitches0[($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) + %inst2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := 1
            end if
            if(%subarticulations_interval_selection[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[(%inst2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])]]] > 0)
              if(search(%found_shared_legatos, %subarticulations_interval_selection[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[(%inst2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])]]]) = -1)
                %found_shared_legatos[search(%found_shared_legatos, 0)] := %subarticulations_interval_selection[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[(%inst2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])]]]
              end if
            end if
          end if
          %subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %subart0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + %_step511[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        end while
      end if
      %ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + %_step520[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
    end while
    %inst2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %inst2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + %_step530[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
  end while
  $i := %nki_range[0]
  while($i <= %nki_range[1]) 
    %inst2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    %_step530[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1

      while(((%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < %_stop520[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%_step520[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > 0)) or ((%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > %_stop520[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%_step520[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0)))

        $note16 := %ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        $keyswitch16 := $i
        call event_list_get_articulation_event
        %event2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $result10
        if(%event2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] >= 0)
          %_step511[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          %_step511[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          %_stop511[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0

          %_stop540[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 4
          while(((%_stop511[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < %_stop540[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%_short_circuit10[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > 0)) or ((%_stop511[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > %_stop540[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%_short_circuit10[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0))) 
            %_short_circuit20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            %_sc_temp00[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
            $ks00 := %_loaded_subarticulations[(%inst2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %_stop511[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])]
            call subarticulation_reacts_to_modwheel
            %_ret540[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $s00

              if(%_longs_in_new_keyswitches0[($NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100) + %inst2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] = 1)
                %_sc_temp00[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
              end if
            end if
            if(%_sc_temp00[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = 1)
              $articulation_event_id4 := %event2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
              $subarticulation1 := %_stop511[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
              call articulation_event_get_subarticulation_event_id
              %_ret550[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $ret23
              if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[%_ret550[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
                %_short_circuit20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
              end if
            end if
            if(%_short_circuit20[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = 1)
              if((%subarticulations_interval_selection[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[(%inst2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %_stop511[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])]]] = 0) or (search(%found_shared_legatos, %subarticulations_interval_selection[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[(%inst2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%ks5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %_stop511[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])]]]) = -1))
                $articulation_event_id4 := %event2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
                $subarticulation1 := %_stop511[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]

end function
function articulations_compute_fade_level
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 := 0.
  $is_free00 := %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($trigger_clear000 * 32) + (($i3000 * 4) + $is_active000)]
  $i310 := %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($trigger_clear000 * 32) + (($i3000 * 4) + $is_active000)]
  $idx330 := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($trigger_clear000 * 32) + (($i3000 * 4) + $is_active000)]
  $fade_out_range0 := %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($trigger_clear000 * 32) + (($i3000 * 4) + $is_active000)]
  if(in_range($_ret2400, $is_free00, $idx330))
    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 := 1.
    if(in_range($_ret2400, $is_free00, $is_free00 + $i310) and ($i310 > 0))
      ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 := real($_ret2400 - $is_free00) / real($i310)
    else
      if(in_range($_ret2400, $idx330 - $fade_out_range0, $idx330) and ($fade_out_range0 > 0))
        ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0 := real($idx330 - $_ret2400) / real($fade_out_range0)
      end if
    end if
  end if
  ~ret32 := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength0
end function

function get_next_rr
  $rr1 := 0
  $allow_repetitions0 := 0
  if(%subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($fade_out_end000 * 32) + (($fade_in_range000 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] = 0)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($fade_out_end000 * 32) + (($fade_in_range000 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)] = 0)
      $rr1 := (%_rr_data_idx[($fade_out_end000 * 4096) + (($fade_in_range000 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note15))] + 1) mod %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($fade_out_end000 * 32) + (($fade_in_range000 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]]
    else
      $rr1 := random(0, %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($fade_out_end000 * 32) + (($fade_in_range000 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] - 1)
    end if
  else
    if(($ENGINE_UPTIME - %_rr_data_time[($fade_out_end000 * 4096) + (($fade_in_range000 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note15))]) > %subarticulations_rrr_reset_time[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($fade_out_end000 * 32) + (($fade_in_range000 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]])
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($fade_out_end000 * 32) + (($fade_in_range000 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)] = 0)
        $rr1 := (%_rr_data_idx[($fade_out_end000 * 4096) + (($fade_in_range000 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note15))] + 1) mod %subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($fade_out_end000 * 32) + (($fade_in_range000 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]]
      else
        $rr1 := random(0, %subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($fade_out_end000 * 32) + (($fade_in_range000 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] - 1)
        $allow_repetitions0 := 1
      end if
    else
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($fade_out_end000 * 32) + (($fade_in_range000 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)] = 0)
        $rr1 := %subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($fade_out_end000 * 32) + (($fade_in_range000 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] - ((%subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($fade_out_end000 * 32) + (($fade_in_range000 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] - ((%_rr_data_idx[($fade_out_end000 * 4096) + (($fade_in_range000 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note15))] + 1) mod %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($fade_out_end000 * 32) + (($fade_in_range000 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]])) .and. sh_right(%subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($fade_out_end000 * 32) + (($fade_in_range000 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] - ((%_rr_data_idx[($fade_out_end000 * 4096) + (($fade_in_range000 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note15))] + 1) mod %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($fade_out_end000 * 32) + (($fade_in_range000 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]]), 31))
      else
        $rr1 := random(%subarticulations_rrr[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($fade_out_end000 * 32) + (($fade_in_range000 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]], %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($fade_out_end000 * 32) + (($fade_in_range000 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]] - 1)
      end if
    end if
    %_rr_data_time[($fade_out_end000 * 4096) + (($fade_in_range000 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note15))] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
  end if
  if(($rr1 = %_rr_data_idx[($fade_out_end000 * 4096) + (($fade_in_range000 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note15))]) and ($allow_repetitions0 = 0))
    $rr1 := ($rr1 + 1) mod %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($fade_out_end000 * 32) + (($fade_in_range000 * 4) + $subarticulation_idx7)]]]
  end if
  %_rr_data_idx[($fade_out_end000 * 4096) + (($fade_in_range000 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx7 * 128) + $note15))] := $rr1
  $fade_out_range000 := $rr1
end function

function subarticulation_event_fade_in
  if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[$_iter801060] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
    fade_in(%subarticulation_event_list[$_iter801060], $_iter91060 * 1000)
    if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$_iter801060] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
      fade_in(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$_iter801060], $_iter91060 * 1000)
    end if
    if(%subarticulation_event_transition_event_id[$_iter801060] # -1)
      fade_in(%subarticulation_event_transition_event_id[$_iter801060], $_iter91060 * 1000)
    end if
    if(%subarticulation_event_transition_octave_event_id[$_iter801060] # -1)
      fade_in(%subarticulation_event_transition_octave_event_id[$_iter801060], $_iter91060 * 1000)
    end if
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_event_disallow_groups

  $b17002 := 0

end function
function subarticulation_event_allow_groups
  $p_slice0002 := $_iter8002102

function subarticulation_event_change_vol
  if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_list[$_ret17002] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
    change_vol(%subarticulation_event_list[$_ret17002], $tmp0002, $current_filtermethod002)
    if(abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$_ret17002] - -1) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) = 1)
      change_vol(%subarticulation_event_octave_layer_id[$_ret17002], $tmp0002, $current_filtermethod002)
    end if
  end if
end function
function update_authoring_labels
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_sustain_release), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, $sli_sustain_release & " + " & $sli_sustain_release_offset & " ms")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_trans_start), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, $sli_trans_start & " + " & $sli_trans_start_offset & " ms")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_trans_fadeIn), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int((real($sli_trans_fadeIn) / 1000000.) * 750.) & " + " & int((real($sli_trans_fadeIn_offset) / 1000000.) * 750.) & " ms")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, (round((real($sli_trans_volume) / 1000.) * pow(10., 2.)) / pow(10., 2.)) & " + " & (round((real($sli_trans_volume_offset) / 1000.) * pow(10., 2.)) / pow(10., 2.)) & " dB")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_trans_fadeOut), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int((real($sli_trans_fadeOut) / 1000000.) * 1000.) & " + " & int((real($sli_trans_fadeOut_offset) / 1000000.) * 1000.) & " ms")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_sustain_wait), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int((real($sli_sustain_wait) / 1000000.) * 500.) & " + " & int((real($sli_sustain_wait_offset) / 1000000.) * 500.) & " ms")
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_sustain_fadeIn), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int((real($sli_sustain_fadeIn) / 1000000.) * 500.) & " + " & int((real($sli_sustain_fadeIn_offset) / 1000000.) * 500.) & " ms")
end function

    set_control_par(get_ui_id($vlue_authoring_start_note), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $i30100)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($vlue_authoring_end_note), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $is_active0100)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $_ret37000)
    if(abs($i30100 - $is_active0100) <= 12)
      $authoring_interval_valid := 1
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_release), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_release_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i30100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i30100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i30100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_start), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_zone_start[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i30100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i30100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i30100), 31) * 12)))])

      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i30100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i30100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i30100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_fadeOut), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i30100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i30100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i30100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_wait), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_wait_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i30100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i30100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i30100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_fadeIn), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i30100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i30100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i30100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_release_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_release_time_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i30100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i30100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i30100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_start_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_zone_start_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i30100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i30100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i30100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_fadeIn_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i30100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i30100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i30100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_volume_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i30100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i30100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i30100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_fadeOut_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i30100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i30100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i30100), 31) * 12)))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_wait_offset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_legato_data_sus_wait_time_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($i30100 * 25) + (abs($is_active0100 - $i30100) + (- sh_right(- ($is_active0100 - $i30100), 31) * 12)))])

end function

end function

          end if

      end if
      if(((%subarticulations_release_group[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$i800]] = 1) and (($authoring_page_active = 0) or ($btn_play_sustain = 1))) and ($_step28000 < 0))
        $_stop28000 := play_note(%subarticulation_event_actual_note[$subarticulation_event_id3], %key_velocity[%subarticulation_event_note[$subarticulation_event_id3]], 0, 0)
        $event0 := $_stop28000

          $octave_event0 := play_note(%subarticulation_event_actual_note[$subarticulation_event_id3] + 12, %key_velocity[%subarticulation_event_note[$subarticulation_event_id3]], 0, 0)
          $event0 := $octave_event0
          $output_type0 := $OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT
          $instrument1 := %articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id3]]
          call redirect_output_ensemble
        end if
        $_iter8016003 := $subarticulation_event_id3

              call subarticulation_event_allow_groups
            end if
            inc($ii5)
          end while
          inc($i41)
        end while
        $i7 := $subarticulation_event_id3
        $lowest1 := %subarticulation_event_modulation[$subarticulation_event_id3]
        call subarticulation_set_modulation

        $current_filtermethod002 := 1

          $iii2 := %articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$subarticulation_event_id3]]

end function
function subarticulation_play_note
  $subarticulation_event_id18 := 0
  $ret502002 := -1
  $current0022002 := 0
  while(($current0022002 < 256) and ($current0022002 >= 0)) 
    $current0022002 := search(%subarticulation_event_list, -1, $current0022002, 256)
    if($current0022002 >= 0)
      if(%subarticulation_event_last_used[$current0022002] < ($ENGINE_UPTIME - $lookahead))
        $ret502002 := $current0022002
        $current0022002 := 256
      end if
      inc($current0022002)
    end if
  end while
  $_iter9022002 := $ret502002
  $subarticulation_event_id18 := $_iter9022002
  $idx360 := 0
  $result110 := -1
  if(%_articulation_mw_to_velocity[($cc_value110 * 8) + $transition_idx000] = 1)
    $modulation1 := int((1000000. * (real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($cc_value110 * 32) + (($transition_idx000 * 4) + $subart_slot100)]) + ((real($velocity0) / 127.) * real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($cc_value110 * 32) + (($transition_idx000 * 4) + $subart_slot100)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($cc_value110 * 32) + (($transition_idx000 * 4) + $subart_slot100)])))) / 127.)
    $trigger_clear000 := $cc_value110
    $i3000 := $transition_idx000
    $is_active000 := $subart_slot100
    $_ret2400 := $velocity0
    call articulations_compute_fade_level
    ~_ret760 := ~ret32
    $level1 := int(((real($velocity0) / 127.) * 1000000.) * ~_ret760)
  end if
  $fade_out_range01 := int((127. * (real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($cc_value110 * 32) + (($transition_idx000 * 4) + $subart_slot100)]) + ((real($velocity0) / 127.) * real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($cc_value110 * 32) + (($transition_idx000 * 4) + $subart_slot100)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($cc_value110 * 32) + (($transition_idx000 * 4) + $subart_slot100)])))) / 127.)
  $fade_in_start01 := -1
  $fade_in_range01 := -1
  $fade_out_end01 := int((real($modulation1) / 1000000.) * 127.)
  $i42 := 0
  $ii6 := 0
  if(($subarticulation_event_id18 # -1) and ($subart_slot100 # -1))
    $_short_circuit50 := 0
    $_sc_temp10 := 0
    if((($subarticulations_solo_states_any_active = 0) or (%_subarticulations_solo_states[($cc_value110 * 32) + (($transition_idx000 * 4) + $subart_slot100)] = 1)) and (%_subarticulations_mute_states[($cc_value110 * 32) + (($transition_idx000 * 4) + $subart_slot100)] = 0))
      $_sc_temp10 := 1
    end if
    if($_sc_temp10 = 1)
      if(%global_fade_in[$i46] = 0)
        $_short_circuit50 := 1
      else
        $ks00 := $idx4600
        call subarticulation_reacts_to_modwheel
        $_ret770 := $s00
        if($_ret770 = 1)
          $_short_circuit50 := 1
        end if
      end if
    end if
    if($_short_circuit50 = 1)
      if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$idx4600]] # 2) and (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$idx4600]] # 9))
        inc(%_articulation_subarticulation_is_playing[($cc_value110 * 32) + (($transition_idx000 * 4) + $subart_slot100)])
        call update_action_display_visibility
        $result81 := %subarticulations_start_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$idx4600]] * $sli_dev_short_note_start
        $idx360 := play_note(($i46 - (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$idx4600]] * 12)) + $transpose0, $fade_out_range01, $result81, 0)
        $event0 := $idx360
        $output_type0 := $OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT
        $instrument1 := $cc_value110
        call redirect_output_ensemble
        if(($octave_layer0 # 0) and in_range((($i46 - (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$idx4600]] * 12)) + $transpose0) + (12 * $octave_layer0), %subarticulations_range_lower[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$idx4600]], %subarticulations_range_upper[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$idx4600]]))
          $result110 := play_note((($i46 - (%subarticulations_octave_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$idx4600]] * 12)) + $transpose0) + (12 * $octave_layer0), $fade_out_range01, $result81, 0)
          $event0 := $result110
          $output_type0 := $OUTPUT_TYPE_BUS_OUT
          $instrument1 := $cc_value110
          call redirect_output_ensemble
        end if
        if(((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$idx4600]] = 0) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$idx4600]] = 3)) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$idx4600]] = 5))
          if($previous_note1 >= 0)
            if((%articulation_event_instrument[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$previous_note1]] = $cc_value110) and (%articulation_event_keyswitch[%subarticulation_event_articulation_event[$previous_note1]] = $transition_idx000))
              $EXIT_FLAG261002 := $previous_note1
              $_iter8010402 := 1000 - int((700. * real(%_loaded_subarticulations_tightness[($cc_value110 * 32) + (($transition_idx000 * 4) + $subart_slot100)])) / 100.)
              $_iter910402 := 1
              call subarticulation_event_fade_out
            end if
          end if
        end if
        $_iter8016003 := $subarticulation_event_id18
        $_iter80030002 := $idx360
        call subarticulation_event_set_event_id
        $_iter80023002 := $subarticulation_event_id18
        $_iter80022002 := $result110
        call subarticulation_octave_layer_set_event_id
        $current002102 := $subarticulation_event_id18
        $ret50102 := $MARK_1
        call subarticulation_event_set_event_mark
        $_iter801060 := $subarticulation_event_id18
        $_iter91060 := %subarticulations_start_offset[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$idx4600]]
        call subarticulation_event_fade_in
        $_iter801402 := $subarticulation_event_id18
        call subarticulation_event_disallow_groups
        $i42 := 0
        while($i42 <= (%subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$idx4600]] - 1)) 
          $ii6 := 0
          while($ii6 <= 5) 
            $_iter8002102 := $subarticulation_event_id18
            $_iter902102 := ((((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$idx4600]] + 1) + (((6 * %subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$idx4600]]) * %subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$idx4600]]) * ($interval1 * (1 + %subarticulations_release_group[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$idx4600]])))) + ((($rr0 * %subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$idx4600]]) * (%subarticulations_release_group[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$idx4600]] + 1)) * 6)) + (($i42 * (%subarticulations_release_group[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$idx4600]] + 1)) * 6)) + $ii6
            call subarticulation_event_allow_groups
            inc($ii6)
          end while
          inc($i42)

function repetition_engine_update_tempo
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 := real(ms_to_ticks(60000000)) / 960.
  if((~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 # ~tempo) or ($NI_CALLBACK_TYPE # $NI_CB_TYPE_LISTENER))
    $transition0 := 0
    $layer0 := 0
    $result7 := 0
    while($result7 <= 0) 
      $transition0 := 0
      while($transition0 <= 7) 
        $layer0 := 0
        while($layer0 <= 3) 
          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($result7 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)] >= 0)
            if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($result7 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)]]] = 0) and (%_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($result7 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)] > 0))
              %_repetition_interval_time[($result7 * 4096) + (($transition0 * 512) + $layer0)] := int((60000. / ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000) * (4. / real(%_loaded_subarticulations_repetition_speed[($result7 * 32) + (($transition0 * 4) + $layer0)])))
            end if
          end if
          inc($layer0)
        end while
        inc($transition0)
      end while
      inc($result7)
    end while
    ~tempo := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000
  end if
end function
function murmation_rng
  $articulation_event_id4 := 0
  $_step2500 := $NI_TRANSPORT_RUNNING
  $_stop2500 := $NI_SONG_POSITION / 25
  $_stop5700 := random(0, 10000000)
  call switch
  $articulation_event_id4 := $i350
  $articulation_event_id4 := (8088405 * $articulation_event_id4) + 1
  $trigger_clear0100 := ((sh_right($articulation_event_id4, 8) .and. 16777215) mod (($ret23 - $i290100) + 1)) + $i290100
end function
function update_dynamic_range_cursor
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 1) + int((real((($subarticulation_idx1 * (1 + (sh_right(127 - $subarticulation_idx1, 31) .or. sh_right($subarticulation_idx1 - 1, 31)))) - sh_right($subarticulation_idx1 - 1, 31)) - (127 * sh_right(127 - $subarticulation_idx1, 31))) / 127.) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))))
end function
function update_modwheel_assignment_cursor
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 2) * (real($keyswitch2) / 127.)))
end function
function update_keyswitch_volume_curve_cursor
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 2) * (real($instrument4) / 127.)))
end function
function Utils__doubleclick_start0
  set_control_par($_ret720, $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par($result63, $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  set_control_par($_ret720, $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par($result63, $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y))
  set_control_par($_ret720, $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par($result63, $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
  set_control_par($_ret720, $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, get_control_par($result63, $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
  set_control_par($_ret720, $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  $_ret720 := 0
  %Utils__clicktime[0] := $result63
  %Utils__clicktime[1] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
end function
function subarticulation_group_count
  $s00 := 0
  if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$ks00]] = 2) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$ks00]] = 9))
    $s00 := 6 * ((%subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$ks00]] * 3) + %subarticulations_trans_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$ks00]])
  else
    $s00 := (6 * %subarticulations_interval_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$ks00]]) * ((%subarticulations_rr_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$ks00]] * %subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$ks00]]) * (1 + %subarticulations_release_group[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$ks00]]))
  end if
  $highest00 := $s00
end function
function update_articulation_icon
  set_control_par_str(%lbl_keyswitch_icon[$note0], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, !articulation_icon_states[(2 * abs(sh_right(abs(%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $note0]) - 1, 31))) + (%_keyswitch_purge_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $note0] * %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $note0])])
  set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_icon[$note0], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %_articulation_icon[($selected_instrument * 8) + $note0])
end function

          $note15 := 0

            set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
            inc($note15)
          end while
        else
          if($result12 = 1)
            $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_browse_page)
            $note15 := 0
            while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
              set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
              inc($note15)
            end while
          else
            if($result12 = 2)
              $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_editor_page)
              $note15 := 0
              while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
                set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
                inc($note15)
              end while
            else
              if($result12 = 3)
                $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_mixer_page)
                $note15 := 0
                while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
                  set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
                  inc($note15)
                end while
              end if
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
end function
function articulation_browser_open
  $i380 := 1
  call PresetBrowser__show
end function
function display_value_in_control_label
  !label0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
  %idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  if($active_label_displays_ignore = 0)
    !label0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_control_par_str(%set_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT)
    %idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%active_label_displays, %set_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    if(%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = -1)
      %idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%active_label_displays, -1)
      %active_label_displays[%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %set_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      !active_label_displays_texts[%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := !label0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
    end if
    %active_label_displays_cb_ids[%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
    set_control_par_str(%set_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    wait(1200000)
    if($NI_CALLBACK_ID = %active_label_displays_cb_ids[%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
      set_control_par_str(%set_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !active_label_displays_texts[%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
      %active_label_displays[%idx41[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := -1
    end if
  end if
end function
function update_mixer_channels
  $_ret37000 := 0
  $i30100 := 1
  $note15 := 5
  while((($_ret37000 < $note15) and ($i30100 > 0)) or (($_ret37000 > $note15) and ($i30100 < 0))) 
    $subarticulation_idx7 := %microphone_position_states[$_ret37000]
    if($_ret37000 >= 4)
      $subarticulation_idx7 := %microphone_position_states[$_ret37000 + $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_channel_bleed_channel_off), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[6 * abs(sh_right(abs($subarticulation_idx7) - 1, 31))])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_channel_bleed_channel_on), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[6 * abs(sh_right(abs($subarticulation_idx7) - 1, 31))])
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "tgl_horizontal" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($subarticulation_idx7) - 1, 31))])
    end if
    if($nki_type = 0)
      $subarticulation_idx7 := 1
      set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_enable[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    end if
    $_ret720 := abs(sh_right(abs($subarticulation_idx7) - 1, 31))
    set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$_ret720])
    set_control_par(%lbl_mixer_channel_name[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_medium[$subarticulation_idx7])
    set_control_par(%lbl_mixer_channel_out[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_button_small[6 * abs(sh_right(abs($subarticulation_idx7) - 1, 31))])
    set_control_par(%lbl_mixer_channel_rev_send[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_button_small[6 * abs(sh_right(abs($subarticulation_idx7) - 1, 31))])
    set_control_par_str(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_solo" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $subarticulation_idx7])
    set_control_par_str(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_mute" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $subarticulation_idx7])
    set_control_par_str(%sli_mixer_channel_pan[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "slider_pan" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $subarticulation_idx7])
    set_control_par_str(%sli_mixer_channel_volume[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "slider_mixer" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $subarticulation_idx7])
    set_control_par_str(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $subarticulation_idx7])
    set_control_par(%mnu_mixer_channel_out[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_button_small[6 * abs(sh_right(abs($subarticulation_idx7) - 1, 31))])
    set_control_par_str(%mnu_mixer_channel_out[$_ret37000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_dropdown" & !Utils__disabled_assets[1 - $subarticulation_idx7])
    $rr1 := 0
    $is_active0100 := 1
    $ret23 := 5
    while((($rr1 < $ret23) and ($is_active0100 > 0)) or (($rr1 > $ret23) and ($is_active0100 < 0))) 
      set_control_par(%mnu_mixer_channel_out[$rr1], $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, 60)
      $rr1 := $rr1 + $is_active0100
    end while
    $_ret720 := $subarticulation_idx7
    set_control_par(%lvl_mixer_channel_volume[$_ret37000 * 2], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$_ret720])
    $_ret720 := $subarticulation_idx7
    set_control_par(%lvl_mixer_channel_volume[($_ret37000 * 2) + 1], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$_ret720])
    $_ret37000 := $_ret37000 + $i30100
  end while
end function
function update_solo_selection
  $keyswitch2 := 0
  $note1 := 0
  while($note1 <= 4) 
    if(get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[$note1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
      $keyswitch2 := 1
    end if
    inc($note1)
  end while
  if($keyswitch2 = 1)
    $note1 := 0
    while($note1 <= 4) 
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 396851 * get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[$note1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 5, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $note1)
      inc($note1)
    end while
  else
    $note1 := 0
    while($note1 <= 4) 
      set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, 396851 * abs(sh_right(abs(get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[$note1], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) - 1, 31)), -1, 5, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + $note1)
      inc($note1)
    end while
  end if
end function
function update_mixer_channel_output

    $rr1 := $rr1 + $is_active0100
  end while
end function
function subarticulation_browser_load_category
  $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
  $selected_category := $i38
  $event0 := 0
  while($event0 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
    if($event0 = $i38)
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$event0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    else
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$event0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
    inc($event0)
  end while
  $i290 := 0
  $event0 := 0
  while($event0 <= 31) 
    if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($i38 * 32) + $event0)] # -1)
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($i38 * 32) + $event0)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        $i290 := $event0
      end if
    else
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $event0
      $event0 := 32
    end if
    inc($event0)
  end while
  message("selected_idx: " & $i290 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
  if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    $i290 := 0
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
    $i290 := $i290 - (($i290 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $i290, 31))
  end if
  $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $i38
  $min_idx0 := $i290
  $i40 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
  $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($i40 - (($min_idx0 * $i40) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($i40 - (($min_idx0 * $i40) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($i40 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $i40))
  $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($i40 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $i40
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
      set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_display_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_browser_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_ks_browse")
end function
function move_legato_buffer_to_instrument
  $subarticulation_idx0 := 0
  $keyswitch1 := 0
  $instrument0 := 0
  $note0 := 0
  while($note0 <= 1) 
    $subarticulation_idx0 := 0
    while($subarticulation_idx0 <= 127) 
      $keyswitch1 := 0
      while($keyswitch1 <= 24) 
        %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time[($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_sus_release_time[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time[($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_sus_wait_time[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time[($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time[($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time[($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_zone_start[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start[($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume[($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time_offset[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time_offset[($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_sus_release_time_offset[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time_offset[($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_sus_wait_time_offset[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time_offset[($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time_offset[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time_offset[($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_zone_start_offset[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start_offset[($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume_offset[($result7 * 204800) + (($transition0 * 25600) + (($layer0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1))))] := %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume_offset[($note0 * 3200) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 25) + $keyswitch1)]
        inc($keyswitch1)
      end while
      inc($subarticulation_idx0)
    end while
    inc($note0)
  end while
  $instrument0 := 0
  while($instrument0 <= 127) 
    %_legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[($result7 * 4096) + (($transition0 * 512) + (($layer0 * 128) + $instrument0))] := %legato_data_buffer_all_transitions_volume_curve[$instrument0]
    inc($instrument0)
  end while
end function
function subarticulation_set_envelope
  $ii5 := 0
  $i41 := 1
  $octave_event0 := 1
  $ks00 := $string01
  call subarticulation_group_count
  $_stop28000 := $highest00
  $_step28000 := $_stop28000 + 1
  while((($i41 < $_step28000) and ($octave_event0 > 0)) or (($i41 > $_step28000) and ($octave_event0 < 0))) 
    if((($i41 - 1) mod 6) = 0)
      $transition_idx000 := $string01
      $cc_value110 := $i41
      $current01060 := 0
      while($current01060 = 0) 
        if((%subarticulations_release_group[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$transition_idx000]] = 0) or ($cc_value110 = 0))
          $subart_slot100 := 0
          $current01060 := 1
          continue
        end if
        $string010 := 0
        if(%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$transition_idx000]] = 2)
          if((($cc_value110 - 1) / 6) >= ((%subarticulations_dynamic_layers[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$transition_idx000]] * 2) + %subarticulations_trans_num[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$transition_idx000]]))
            $string010 := 1
          end if
        else
          if(((($cc_value110 - 1) / 6) mod 2) = 1)
            $string010 := 1
          end if
        end if
        $subart_slot100 := $string010
        $current01060 := 1
        continue
      end while
      $ii5 := $subart_slot100
    end if
    if($ii5 = $_ret950)
      $lowest00 := %subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$string01]] + $i41
      $highest1 := $string00
      $lowest1 := $reduced_note00
      $i7 := $_ret950
      message("group_id: " & $lowest00)
      !release_mod_names0[0] := "ENV_AHDSR"
      !release_mod_names0[1] := "ENV_AHDSR_RELEASE"
      $i46 := get_mod_idx($lowest00, !release_mod_names0[$i7])
      $idx4600 := get_target_idx($lowest00, $i46, "ENV_AHDSR_VOLUME")
      set_engine_par($highest1, $lowest1, $lowest00, $i46, $idx4600)
    end if
    $i41 := $i41 + $octave_event0
  end while
end function
function switch3
  $fade_in_range010 := 0
  if($allow_repetitions00 = 0)
    $fade_in_range010 := $fade_in_range001
  else
    if($allow_repetitions00 = 1)
      $fade_in_range010 := $s00
    else
      $fade_in_range010 := $fade_out_end010
    end if
  end if
  $fade_in_start000 := $fade_in_range010
end function
function update_mixer_eq
  $btn_mixer_eq_disable_input := $btn_mixer_eq_title
  $_ret720 := abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_eq_disable_input), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$_ret720])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_low), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_mid), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_high), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_eq_low), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[6 * abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_eq_mid), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[6 * abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_eq_high), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[6 * abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS, abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_eq_title) - 1, 31)), -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN1, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_low), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN2, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_mid), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GAIN3, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_high), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
end function
function update_mixer_comp
  $btn_mixer_comp_disable_input := $btn_mixer_comp_title
  $_ret720 := abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_comp_title) - 1, 31))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_comp_disable_input), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$_ret720])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_compression), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_comp_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_mix), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_comp_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_comp_compression), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[6 * abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_comp_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_comp_mix), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[6 * abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_comp_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS, abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_comp_title) - 1, 31)), -1, 2, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SUPERGT_COMPRESS, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_compression), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 2, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SUPERGT_MIX, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_mix), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 2, $NI_MAIN_BUS)
end function
function update_mixer_rev
  $btn_mixer_rev_disable_input := $btn_mixer_rev_title
  $_ret720 := abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_rev_title) - 1, 31))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_rev_disable_input), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$_ret720])
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_rev_return), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "knb_small" & !Utils__disabled_assets[abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_rev_title) - 1, 31))])
  if($btn_mixer_rev_title = 1)
    $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($mnu_mixer_rev_preset)
    $note15 := 0
    while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
      set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_label_small[$note15])
      inc($note15)
    end while
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_mixer_rev_preset), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[6])
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_rev_return), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[6 * abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_rev_title) - 1, 31))])
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_BYPASS, abs(sh_right(abs($btn_mixer_rev_title) - 1, 31)), -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_OUTPUT_GAIN, get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_rev_return), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
end function
function mixer_page_open
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_mixer_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  $btn_mixer_eq_title := abs(sh_right(abs(get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS, -1, 1, $NI_MAIN_BUS)) - 1, 31))
  $btn_mixer_comp_title := abs(sh_right(abs(get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_EFFECT_BYPASS, -1, 2, $NI_MAIN_BUS)) - 1, 31))
  $btn_mixer_rev_title := abs(sh_right(abs(get_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SEND_EFFECT_BYPASS, -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)) - 1, 31))
  call update_mixer_eq
  call update_mixer_comp
  call update_mixer_rev
end function
function update_page_buttons
  $btn_main_page := - sh_right(abs($result12) - 1, 31)
  $btn_browse_page := - sh_right(abs($result12 - 1) - 1, 31)
  $btn_editor_page := - sh_right(abs($result12 - 2) - 1, 31)
  $btn_mixer_page := - sh_right(abs($result12 - 3) - 1, 31)
  $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_main_page)
  $note15 := 0
  while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
    set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item[$note15])
    inc($note15)
  end while
  $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_browse_page)
  $note15 := 0
  while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
    set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item[$note15])
    inc($note15)
  end while
  $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_editor_page)
  $note15 := 0
  while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
    set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item[$note15])
    inc($note15)
  end while
  $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_mixer_page)
  $note15 := 0
  while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
    set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item[$note15])
    inc($note15)
  end while
  if($result12 = 0)
    $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_main_page)
    $note15 := 0
    while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
      set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
      inc($note15)
    end while
  else
    if($result12 = 1)
      $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_browse_page)
      $note15 := 0
      while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
        set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
        inc($note15)
      end while
    else
      if($result12 = 2)
        $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_editor_page)
        $note15 := 0
        while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
          set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
          inc($note15)
        end while
      else
        if($result12 = 3)
          $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_mixer_page)
          $note15 := 0
          while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
            set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
            inc($note15)
          end while
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
end function
function editor_page_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_ks_browse")
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
end function
function mixer_page_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_mixer_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
end function
function articulation_browser_close
  $i380 := 0
  call PresetBrowser__show
end function
function show_keyswitches
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_keyswitches), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$subarticulation0])
end function
function authoring_close
  $btn_show_authoring_tools := 0
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_authoring), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  $authoring_page_active := 0
end function
function main_page_close
  call authoring_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_main_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
end function
function update_main_buttons_display
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_main_buttons), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_credits), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_settings_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_main_buttons), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_credits), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_credits_return), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_main_buttons), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31) .or. - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31))])
  if(- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($PresetBrowser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31) = 1)
    $result12 := 1
    $btn_main_page := 0
    $btn_browse_page := 1
    $btn_editor_page := 0
    $btn_mixer_page := 0
    $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_main_page)
    $note15 := 0
    while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
      set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item[$note15])
      inc($note15)
    end while
    $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_browse_page)
    $note15 := 0
    while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
      set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item[$note15])
      inc($note15)
    end while
    $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_editor_page)
    $note15 := 0
    while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
      set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item[$note15])
      inc($note15)
    end while
    $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_mixer_page)
    $note15 := 0
    while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
      set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item[$note15])
      inc($note15)
    end while
    if($result12 = 0)
      $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_main_page)
      $note15 := 0
      while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
        set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
        inc($note15)
      end while
    else
      if($result12 = 1)
        $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_browse_page)
        $note15 := 0
        while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
          set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
          inc($note15)
        end while
      else
        if($result12 = 2)
          $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_editor_page)
          $note15 := 0
          while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
            set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
            inc($note15)
          end while
        else
          if($result12 = 3)
            $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_mixer_page)
            $note15 := 0
            while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
              set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
              inc($note15)
            end while
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
  else
    if(- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_mixer_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31) = 1)
      $result12 := 3
      $btn_main_page := 0
      $btn_browse_page := 0
      $btn_editor_page := 0
      $btn_mixer_page := 1
      $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_main_page)
      $note15 := 0
      while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
        set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item[$note15])
        inc($note15)
      end while
      $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_browse_page)
      $note15 := 0
      while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
        set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item[$note15])
        inc($note15)
      end while
      $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_editor_page)
      $note15 := 0
      while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
        set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item[$note15])
        inc($note15)
      end while
      $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_mixer_page)
      $note15 := 0
      while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
        set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item[$note15])
        inc($note15)
      end while
      if($result12 = 0)
        $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_main_page)
        $note15 := 0
        while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
          set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
          inc($note15)
        end while
      else
        if($result12 = 1)
          $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_browse_page)
          $note15 := 0
          while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
            set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
            inc($note15)
          end while
        else
          if($result12 = 2)
            $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_editor_page)
            $note15 := 0
            while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1))
