              set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
              inc($note15)
            end while
          else
            if($result12 = 3)
              $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_mixer_page)
              $note15 := 0
              while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
                set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
                inc($note15)
              end while
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
    else
      if(- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_page), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31) = 1)
        $result12 := 2
        $btn_main_page := 0
        $btn_browse_page := 0
        $btn_editor_page := 1
        $btn_mixer_page := 0
        $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_main_page)
        $note15 := 0
        while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
          set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item[$note15])
          inc($note15)
        end while
        $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_browse_page)
        $note15 := 0
        while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
          set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item[$note15])
          inc($note15)
        end while
        $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_editor_page)
        $note15 := 0
        while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
          set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item[$note15])
          inc($note15)
        end while
        $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_mixer_page)
        $note15 := 0
        while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
          set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item[$note15])
          inc($note15)
        end while
        if($result12 = 0)
          $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_main_page)
          $note15 := 0
          while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
            set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
            inc($note15)
          end while
        else
          if($result12 = 1)
            $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_browse_page)
            $note15 := 0
            while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
              set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
              inc($note15)
            end while
          else
            if($result12 = 2)
              $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_editor_page)
              $note15 := 0
              while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
                set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
                inc($note15)
              end while
            else
              if($result12 = 3)
                $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_mixer_page)
                $note15 := 0
                while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
                  set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
                  inc($note15)
                end while
              end if
            end if
          end if
        end if
      else
        $result12 := 0
        $btn_main_page := 1
        $btn_browse_page := 0
        $btn_editor_page := 0
        $btn_mixer_page := 0
        $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_main_page)
        $note15 := 0
        while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
          set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item[$note15])
          inc($note15)
        end while
        $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_browse_page)
        $note15 := 0
        while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
          set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item[$note15])
          inc($note15)
        end while
        $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_editor_page)
        $note15 := 0
        while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
          set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item[$note15])
          inc($note15)
        end while
        $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_mixer_page)
        $note15 := 0
        while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
          set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item[$note15])
          inc($note15)
        end while
        if($result12 = 0)
          $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_main_page)
          $note15 := 0
          while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
            set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
            inc($note15)
          end while
        else
          if($result12 = 1)
            $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_browse_page)
            $note15 := 0
            while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
              set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
              inc($note15)
            end while
          else
            if($result12 = 2)
              $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_editor_page)
              $note15 := 0
              while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
                set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
                inc($note15)
              end while
            else
              if($result12 = 3)
                $subarticulation_idx7 := get_ui_id($btn_mixer_page)
                $note15 := 0
                while($note15 <= (num_elements(%font_types) - 1)) 
                  set_control_par($subarticulation_idx7, %font_types[$note15], %font_footer_item_selected[$note15])
                  inc($note15)
                end while
              end if
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
end function
function settings_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  call update_main_buttons_display
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_settings), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
end function
function credits_close
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_credits), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  call update_main_buttons_display
  $btn_sonu_logo := 0
end function
function find_loaded_legato
  $authoring_page_active := 0
  if(%_loaded_subarticulations[0] # -1)
    if(%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[0]]] = 2)
      $authoring_page_active := 1
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_authoring_legato_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_display_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[0]]] & " (" & %_loaded_subarticulations[0] & ")")
    end if
  end if
end function
function keyswitch_name_edit_show
  @txt_keyswitch_name := !_articulation_names[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_keyswitch_name_edit), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[$result12])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_name), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs($result12) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_name_edit), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, $result12)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_name_edit), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs($result12) - 1, 31))])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[abs(sh_right(abs($result12) - 1, 31))])
end function
function set_current_articulation_name
  !_articulation_names[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := @name2
end function
function update_keyswitch_volume_curve
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
  $i := 0
  while($i <= (num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope) - 1)) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(round(real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) + (real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.) - int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) * pow(real($i) / real(num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope)), (real(%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 100.) + 1.)))))
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function update_subarticulation_selection
  $allow_repetitions00 := $selected_subarticulation
  $fade_in_start000 := 0
  while($fade_in_start000 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
    if($fade_in_start000 # $allow_repetitions00)
      set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$fade_in_start000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    else
      set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$fade_in_start000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    end if
    inc($fade_in_start000)
  end while
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  end if
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    $displayed_subarticulation := $selected_subarticulation
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    " & !subarticulations_display_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]])
    else
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "    Empty")
    end if
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_solo_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_solo_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mute_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_mute_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $selected_subarticulation)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_volume[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
  else
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_layer_selection), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, 4)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    $subarticulation1 := 0
    $articulation_event_id4 := 1
    $fade_out_range0 := num_elements(%btn_editor_overview)
    while((($subarticulation1 < $fade_out_range0) and ($articulation_event_id4 > 0)) or (($subarticulation1 > $fade_out_range0) and ($articulation_event_id4 < 0))) 
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $subarticulation1)] # -1)
        set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$subarticulation1], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_display_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $subarticulation1)]]])
      else
        set_control_par_str(%btn_editor_overview[$subarticulation1], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "Empty")
      end if
      $subarticulation1 := $subarticulation1 + $articulation_event_id4
    end while
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      $i30100 := 0
      $_ret37000 := 1
      $result7 := 4
      while((($i30100 < $result7) and ($_ret37000 > 0)) or (($i30100 > $result7) and ($_ret37000 < 0))) 
        set_control_par(%lbl_editor_overview_action_display[$i30100], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, %Utils__hide_state[1 + sh_right(abs(%_articulation_subarticulation_is_playing[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i30100)]) - 1, 31)])
        $i30100 := $i30100 + $_ret37000
      end while
    end if
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_repetition_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_repetition_speed_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_rr_mode_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 0) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 5))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_tightness[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_tightness), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      $mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode := %_loaded_subarticulations_rr_mode[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_subarticulation_rr_mode), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_rr_mode_title), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
    if((%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 2) or (%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]] = 9))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_volume[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_volume), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "slider_large")
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[0])
      $btn_subarticulation_trans_speed := %_loaded_subarticulations_trans_speed_auto[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      if($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed = 1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_trans_speed_blocker), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "slider_large_disabled")
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_trans_speed), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[6])
      end if
    end if
  end if
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      if($i = $selected_subarticulation)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      $note1 := %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $is_active0100 := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $result12 := int(round((real($note1) / 127.) * real(31 + (sh_right($note1 - 32, 31) + 1))))
      $transition_type0 := int((real($is_active0100) / 127.) * 31.)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %center_circles_frame_sums[$result12] + $transition_type0)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $note1)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $is_active0100)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(floor(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 10)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(floor((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, int(floor((?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0]) * 225.)))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 225)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 1)
  end if
  ?xy_dynamic_range[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  ?xy_dynamic_range[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[0] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 10)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  $subarticulation_idx1 := int((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * (1. - (real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage) / 100.))) + ((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage)) / 100.))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 1) + int((real((($subarticulation_idx1 * (1 + (sh_right(127 - $subarticulation_idx1, 31) .or. sh_right($subarticulation_idx1 - 1, 31)))) - sh_right($subarticulation_idx1 - 1, 31)) - (127 * sh_right(127 - $subarticulation_idx1, 31))) / 127.) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))))
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) = $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_back")
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
    if($selected_subarticulation < 0)
      $selected_subarticulation := 0
      $btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all := 0
      $allow_repetitions00 := 0
      $fade_in_start000 := 0
      while($fade_in_start000 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
        if($fade_in_start000 # $allow_repetitions00)
          set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$fade_in_start000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$fade_in_start000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        end if
        inc($fade_in_start000)
      end while
    end if
    $trigger_clear01000 := 0
    $i2901000 := 1
    $i301000 := num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category)
    while((($trigger_clear01000 < $i301000) and ($i2901000 > 0)) or (($trigger_clear01000 > $i301000) and ($i2901000 < 0))) 
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[($selected_instrument * 192) + ($trigger_clear01000 * 32)] = -1)
        set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$trigger_clear01000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_category_small_disabled")
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$trigger_clear01000], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_button_small[6])
      else
        set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$trigger_clear01000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_category_small")
      end if
      $trigger_clear01000 := $trigger_clear01000 + $i2901000
    end while
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
      $i38 := %type_to_category[%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]]]
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
      $selected_category := $i38
      $event0 := 0
      while($event0 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
        if($event0 = $i38)
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$event0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$event0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
        inc($event0)
      end while
      $i290 := 0
      $event0 := 0
      while($event0 <= 31) 
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($i38 * 32) + $event0)] # -1)
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($i38 * 32) + $event0)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
            $i290 := $event0
          end if
        else
          $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $event0
          $event0 := 32
        end if
        inc($event0)
      end while
      message("selected_idx: " & $i290 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
      if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        $i290 := 0
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
        $i290 := $i290 - (($i290 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $i290, 31))
      end if
      $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $i38
      $min_idx0 := $i290
      $i40 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
      $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($i40 - (($min_idx0 * $i40) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($i40 - (($min_idx0 * $i40) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($i40 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $i40))
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($i40 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $i40
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
          set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_display_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
          else
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          end if
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
    else
      $i38 := 0
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
      $selected_category := 0
      $event0 := 0
      while($event0 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
        if($event0 = $i38)
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$event0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$event0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
        inc($event0)
      end while
      $i290 := 0
      $event0 := 0
      while($event0 <= 31) 
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($i38 * 32) + $event0)] # -1)
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($i38 * 32) + $event0)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
            $i290 := $event0
          end if
        else
          $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $event0
          $event0 := 32
        end if
        inc($event0)
      end while
      message("selected_idx: " & $i290 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
      if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        $i290 := 0
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
        $i290 := $i290 - (($i290 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $i290, 31))
      end if
      $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $i38
      $min_idx0 := $i290
      $i40 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
      $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($i40 - (($min_idx0 * $i40) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($i40 - (($min_idx0 * $i40) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($i40 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $i40))
      $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($i40 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $i40
      $i := 0
      while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
          set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_display_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
          if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
          else
            set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
          end if
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        end if
        inc($i)
      end while
      if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
    end if
  end if
end function
function subarticulation_browser_open
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_parameters), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_editor_overview), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_back")
  $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
  if($selected_subarticulation < 0)
    $selected_subarticulation := 0
    $btn_edit_subarticulation_selection_all := 0
    $allow_repetitions00 := 0
    $fade_in_start000 := 0
    while($fade_in_start000 <= (num_elements(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection) - 1)) 
      if($fade_in_start000 # $allow_repetitions00)
        set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$fade_in_start000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_edit_subarticulation_selection[$fade_in_start000], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      end if
      inc($fade_in_start000)
    end while
  end if
  $trigger_clear01000 := 0
  $i2901000 := 1
  $i301000 := num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category)
  while((($trigger_clear01000 < $i301000) and ($i2901000 > 0)) or (($trigger_clear01000 > $i301000) and ($i2901000 < 0))) 
    if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[($selected_instrument * 192) + ($trigger_clear01000 * 32)] = -1)
      set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$trigger_clear01000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_category_small_disabled")
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$trigger_clear01000], $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_button_small[6])
    else
      set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$trigger_clear01000], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE, "btn_category_small")
    end if
    $trigger_clear01000 := $trigger_clear01000 + $i2901000
  end while
  if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] # -1)
    $i38 := %type_to_category[%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]]]]
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
    $selected_category := $i38
    $event0 := 0
    while($event0 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
      if($event0 = $i38)
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$event0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$event0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      inc($event0)
    end while
    $i290 := 0
    $event0 := 0
    while($event0 <= 31) 
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($i38 * 32) + $event0)] # -1)
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($i38 * 32) + $event0)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          $i290 := $event0
        end if
      else
        $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $event0
        $event0 := 32
      end if
      inc($event0)
    end while
    message("selected_idx: " & $i290 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
    if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      $i290 := 0
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
      $i290 := $i290 - (($i290 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $i290, 31))
    end if
    $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $i38
    $min_idx0 := $i290
    $i40 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
    $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($i40 - (($min_idx0 * $i40) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($i40 - (($min_idx0 * $i40) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($i40 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $i40))
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($i40 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $i40
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
        set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_display_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
  else
    $i38 := 0
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := 0
    $selected_category := 0
    $event0 := 0
    while($event0 <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category) - 1)) 
      if($event0 = $i38)
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$event0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
      else
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_category[$event0], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
      end if
      inc($event0)
    end while
    $i290 := 0
    $event0 := 0
    while($event0 <= 31) 
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($i38 * 32) + $event0)] # -1)
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($i38 * 32) + $event0)] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          $i290 := $event0
        end if
      else
        $subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries := $event0
        $event0 := 32
      end if
      inc($event0)
    end while
    message("selected_idx: " & $i290 & ", subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries: " & ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))
    if($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries <= 8)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      $i290 := 0
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(195. / (real($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries) / 8.)))
      $i290 := $i290 - (($i290 - ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) .and. sh_right(($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8) - $i290, 31))
    end if
    $subarticulation_browser_active_category := $i38
    $min_idx0 := $i290
    $i40 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
    $sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar := - (- ($i40 - (($min_idx0 * $i40) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))) .and. sh_right(- ($i40 - (($min_idx0 * $i40) / ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8))), 31))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($i40 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $i40))
    $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($i40 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $i40
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection) - 1)) 
      set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] # -1)
        set_control_par_str(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !subarticulations_display_name[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))]]])
        if(%_subarticulation_browser_entries[((%loaded_instrument_types[$selected_instrument] * - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)) * 192) + (($selected_category * 32) + ($i + $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset))] = %_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)])
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
        else
          set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        end if
        set_control_par(%btn_subarticulation_browser_selection[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      inc($i)
    end while
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] = -1)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 1)
    else
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browser_empty), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    end if
  end if
end function
function update_modwheel_assignment_control
  if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(floor(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 10)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(floor((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, int(floor((?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0]) * 225.)))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 225)
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_in), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_constant), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_fade_out), $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, int((?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]) * 224.))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 1)
  end if
end function
function update_modwheel_assignment_circles
  $i := 0
  while($i <= 3) 
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)] # -1)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      if($i = $selected_subarticulation)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
        set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
      end if
      $note1 := %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $is_active0100 := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $i)]
      $result12 := int(round((real($note1) / 127.) * real(31 + (sh_right($note1 - 32, 31) + 1))))
      $transition_type0 := int((real($is_active0100) / 127.) * 31.)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, %center_circles_frame_sums[$result12] + $transition_type0)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_left[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $note1)
      set_control_par(%lbl_center_circle_bound_right[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_PICTURE_STATE, $is_active0100)
    end if
    inc($i)
  end while
end function
function update_dynamic_range_control
  ?xy_dynamic_range[0] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  ?xy_dynamic_range[2] := real(%_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) / 127.
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[0] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH))))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 10)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_dynamic_range[2] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line_inactive), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH)))) - 1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + 1)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_line), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))
  $subarticulation_idx1 := int((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * (1. - (real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage) / 100.))) + ((real(%modulation_positions[0]) * real($polyphonic_modulation_percentage)) / 100.))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_cursor), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - 1) + int((real((($subarticulation_idx1 * (1 + (sh_right(127 - $subarticulation_idx1, 31) .or. sh_right($subarticulation_idx1 - 1, 31)))) - sh_right($subarticulation_idx1 - 1, 31)) - (127 * sh_right(127 - $subarticulation_idx1, 31))) / 127.) * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_right), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_bound_left), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X))))
end function
function center_circle_angle
  ~fade_level0 := ~fade_level00 - 0.5
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength00 - 0.5
  ~subarticulation_modulation_strength001 := ~fade_level0 / sqrt((~fade_level0 * ~fade_level0) + (~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 * ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000))
  ~fade_level01 := acos(~subarticulation_modulation_strength001)
  if(~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 < 0.)
    ~fade_level01 := (2. * ~NI_MATH_PI) - ~fade_level01
  end if
  ~weight0 := ~fade_level01
end function
function angle_to_value
  ~fade_level0 := ~fade_level01 + (~NI_MATH_PI / 2.)
  if(~fade_level0 > (~NI_MATH_PI * 2.))
    ~fade_level0 := ~fade_level0 - (2. * ~NI_MATH_PI)
  end if
  ~fade_level0 := abs(~fade_level0 - (2. * ~NI_MATH_PI))
  $result12 := int((127. * (~fade_level0 - ~subarticulation_modulation_strength001)) / (~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 - ~subarticulation_modulation_strength001))
end function
function update_keyswitch_settings
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_name), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, !_articulation_names[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])

  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] * -1)
  $i := 0

    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT, int(round(real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) + (real(int((real(%_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.) - int((real(%_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 127.) * 50.)) * pow(real($i) / real(num_elements(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope)), (real(%_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch]) / 100.) + 1.)))))
    set_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_line), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y) - get_control_par(%lbl_keyswitch_volume_curve_envelope[$i], $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))
    inc($i)
  end while
end function

  end while
end function
function Preset______init__
  $Preset____free_idx := search(%Preset____allocation, 0, $Preset____free_idx, 999999)
  if($Preset____free_idx = -1)
    message("Error: No more free space available to allocate objects of type 'Preset'")
  end if
  %Preset____allocation[$Preset____free_idx] := 1
  %Preset____id[$Preset____free_idx] := $_ret720
  !Preset____name[$Preset____free_idx] := @bl002
  $fade_in_start01 := %Preset____tags[$Preset____free_idx]
  $result110 := 1
  $idx360 := $fade_in_start01
  while($idx360 # -1) 
    $subarticulation_event_id18 := 0
    %Floatmask____allocation[$idx360] := %Floatmask____allocation[$idx360] - $result110
    if(%Floatmask____allocation[$idx360] > 0)
      $idx360 := -1
      continue
    else
      %Floatmask____allocation[$idx360] := 0
    end if
    $fade_in_start01 := $idx360
    $idx360 := -1
    $subarticulation_event_id18 := 0
    while($subarticulation_event_id18 <= 1) 
      $string000 := %_Floatmask____fm[($fade_in_start01 * 2) + $subarticulation_event_id18]
      $_stop28000 := 1
      $octave_event0 := $string000
      while($octave_event0 # -1) 
        $i41 := 0
        %Bitlist____allocation[$octave_event0] := %Bitlist____allocation[$octave_event0] - $_stop28000
        if(%Bitlist____allocation[$octave_event0] > 0)
          $octave_event0 := -1
          continue
        else
          %Bitlist____allocation[$octave_event0] := 0
        end if
        $string000 := $octave_event0
        $octave_event0 := -1
        $_ret9500 := $string000
        $reduced_note000 := 0
        if($_ret9500 # -1)
          %Bitlist____val[$_ret9500] := 0
          $Bitlist____free_idx := (($Bitlist____free_idx + $_ret9500) - abs($Bitlist____free_idx - $_ret9500)) / 2
        end if
      end while
      inc($subarticulation_event_id18)
    end while
    $fade_in_range01 := $fade_in_start01
    $fade_out_end01 := 0
    if($fade_in_range01 # -1)
      $_iter17 := 0
      while($_iter17 <= 1) 
        %_Floatmask____fm[($fade_in_range01 * 2) + $_iter17] := -1
        inc($_iter17)
      end while
      $Floatmask____free_idx := (($Floatmask____free_idx + $fade_in_range01) - abs($Floatmask____free_idx - $fade_in_range01)) / 2
    end if
  end while
  %Preset____tags[$Preset____free_idx] := $result63
  $level1 := %Preset____tags[$Preset____free_idx]
  $modulation1 := 1
  if($level1 # -1)
    %Floatmask____allocation[$level1] := %Floatmask____allocation[$level1] + $modulation1
  end if
  %Preset____icon[$Preset____free_idx] := $rr10
  !Preset____file[$Preset____free_idx] := @name2
  %Preset____deleted[$Preset____free_idx] := $fade_in_start000
  $_ret710 := $Preset____free_idx
end function

  $_stop2500 := %Preset____tags[$_short_circuit70]
  $_stop5700 := %Preset____tags[$all_inactive0]
  $ii50 := %_Floatmask____fm[$_stop2500 * 2]
  $modulation1 := %Bitlist____val[%_Floatmask____fm[$_stop5700 * 2]]
  %Bitlist____val[$ii50] := $modulation1
  $ii50 := %_Floatmask____fm[($_stop2500 * 2) + 1]
  $modulation1 := %Bitlist____val[%_Floatmask____fm[($_stop5700 * 2) + 1]]

  !Preset____file[$_short_circuit70] := !Preset____file[$all_inactive0]
  %Preset____deleted[$_short_circuit70] := %Preset____deleted[$all_inactive0]
end function

      $ii7 := $_ret770

function Categories____get_tag_category
  $fade_out_range011 := 0
  while($fade_out_range011 = 0) 
    $_iter9020 := 0
    $current0020 := 0
    while(($current0020 <= 5) and ($fade_out_range011 = 0)) 
      if(($_iter8002101 >= %_Categories____accum[($_iter801401 * 6) + $current0020]) and ($_iter8002101 < %_Categories____accum[($_iter801401 * 6) + ($_iter9020 + 1)]))
        $_iter80020 := $_iter9020
        $fade_out_range011 := 1
        continue
      end if
      inc($current0020)
      inc($_iter9020)
    end while
    if($fade_out_range011 = 1)
      continue
    end if
    $_iter80020 := -1
    $fade_out_range011 := 1
    continue
  end while
end function

on persistence_changed
  if(- sh_right(abs(%development[0] - 22714) - 1, 31) = 0)
    $_iter0 := 0
    while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%idx49) - 1)) 
      %idx49[$_iter0] := 0
      inc($_iter0)
    end while
    %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%dev_tools[%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] # -1) 
      set_control_par(%dev_tools[%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
      %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + 1
    end while
  end if
  $transition0 := 0
  call select_instrument_slot
  @path20 := @name2
  @___print_string00 := @___print_string00
  @nka_path00 := @nka_path00
  $reduced_note0000 := 0

  $ret23 := $use_constant_delay
  call choose_mode
  $sli_modwheel_slider := %CC[1]
  if($use_expression = 1)
    $sli_expression_slider := %CC[$mnu_cc11]
  end if
  $ret23 := %CC[1]
  call set_background_animation
  call update_all_ranges
  call update_minimal_delays
  %i22[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %_step460[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
  %_stop460[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 13
  while(((%i22[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < %_stop460[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%_step460[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > 0)) or ((%i22[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > %_stop460[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%_step460[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0))) 
    !path4[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
    if($nki_type = 0)
      !path4[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := @articulation_sets_path & "Ensemble Articulation Sets/" & !keyswitch_set_names[%i22[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] & ".nka"
    else
      call get_currently_opened_ks_instrument_name
      !_ret150[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := @ret2
      !path4[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := @articulation_sets_path & !_ret150[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & " Articulation Sets/" & !keyswitch_set_names[%i22[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] & ".nka"
    end if

  end while
  $ret36 := 0

on note
  ignore_event($EVENT_ID)
  set_key_pressed($EVENT_NOTE, 1)
  %uiid5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $EVENT_NOTE
  %note5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %uiid5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
  %uiid4[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $lookahead * $use_constant_delay
  call wait_or_zero
  %check_before0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %changed0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  if(in_range(%note5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], $keyswitch_octave * 12, (($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8) - 1))
    %inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    %inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 0) 
      %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 7) 
        %check_before0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %_keyswitch_states[(%inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
        %_keyswitch_states[(%inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %KEY_DOWN[($keyswitch_octave * 12) + %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
        if(%check_before0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # %_keyswitch_states[(%inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]])
          %changed0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
          %_keyswitch_enabled_time[(%inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 8) + %ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
        end if
        $selected_keyswitch := %note5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - ($keyswitch_octave * 12)
        inc(%ks1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      inc(%inst0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
    if(%changed0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = 1)
      if(- sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id($PresetBrowser), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE) - $HIDE_PART_NOTHING) - 1, 31) = 1)
        call PresetBrowser__update_view
        $delay00 := $_ret1700
      end if
      call update_keyswitch_selection
    end if
  end if
  $transition_dyn_layer01 := $delay00
  $_step34001 := $transition_dyn_layer01
  if(($EVENT_NOTE >= %nki_range[0]) and ($EVENT_NOTE <= %nki_range[1]))
    if(%pressed_keys[$EVENT_NOTE] = -1)
      %pressed_keys[$EVENT_NOTE] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
      %last_pressed[$EVENT_NOTE] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
      %key_velocity[$EVENT_NOTE] := $EVENT_VELOCITY
      inc($num_pressed_keys)
    end if
    $last_on_note_callback := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
    $_step2500 := - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)
    $_stop2500 := $NOTE_SELECTION_TIME * 1000
    $_stop5700 := 0
    call switch
    %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $i350
    %uiid4[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
    call wait_or_zero
    if($last_on_note_callback = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
      call update_selected_notes
      $_iter801503 := $_iter801503
      $current010000 := $current010000
    end if
  end if
  if(in_range($EVENT_NOTE, $keyswitch_octave * 12, (($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8) - 1) and ($btn_fade_ks = 1))
    %note5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := int((real(abs($EVENT_VELOCITY - 128)) / 180.) * 4000.)
    call trigger_ks_fade
    $current002103 := $current002103
    $_iter8016005 := $_iter8016005
  end if
end on
on release
  if((get_event_mark($EVENT_ID, $MARK_1) = 0) and ($EVENT_NOTE > ((($keyswitch_octave * 12) + 8) - 1)))
    $last_release_callback := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
    ignore_event($EVENT_ID)
    %pressed_keys[$EVENT_NOTE] := -1
    %last_released[$EVENT_NOTE] := $ENGINE_UPTIME
    dec($num_pressed_keys)
    if($sustain_pedal = 0)
      set_key_pressed($EVENT_NOTE, 0)
      $result100 := $EVENT_NOTE
      $i3900 := 0
      while($i3900 <= 7) 
        set_key_pressed(($keyswitch_octave * 12) + $i3900, %_keyswitch_states[($selected_instrument * 8) + $i3900])
        inc($i3900)
      end while
      message("release " & $EVENT_NOTE)
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 0) 
        $i7 := $i
        $lowest1 := $EVENT_NOTE
        call articulations_note_off
        inc($i)
      end while
      $_step2500 := - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)
      $_stop2500 := $NOTE_SELECTION_TIME * 1000
      $_stop5700 := 0
      call switch
      %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $i350
      %uiid4[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      call wait_or_zero
      $i := 0
      while($i <= 0) 
        %_pressed_notes_per_instrument[($i * 128) + $EVENT_NOTE] := 0
        inc($i)
      end while
      if($last_release_callback = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
        call update_selected_notes
        $_iter8002103 := $_iter8002103
        $current010000 := $current010000
      end if
    end if
    call update_action_display_visibility

        if(%subarticulations_ids[$i46] >= 0)
          if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i46]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
            if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i46]] > 0)
              $lowest00 := %subarticulations_ids[$i46]
              $highest1 := 1
              $i := 0
              $ks00 := $lowest00
              call subarticulation_group_count
              $lowest1 := $highest00
              while($i <= ($lowest1 - 1)) 
                purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest00]] + $i) + 1, $highest1 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
                inc($i)
                $ks00 := $lowest00
                call subarticulation_group_count
                $lowest1 := $highest00
              end while
              $_step2501 := $lowest1
            end if
          end if
        end if
        inc($i46)
      end while
      call update_all_ranges
      call update_minimal_delays
    end if
    $last_click := $ENGINE_UPTIME
  end if
end on

        if((get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1) or (get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1))
          %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          while(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 4) 
            set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
            inc(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end while
          set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL))
        end if
        call update_solo_selection
      end if
      %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_mixer_channel_mute, %uiid5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
        set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        if((get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1) or (get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1))
          %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
          while(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 4) 
            set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
            inc(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end while
          set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL))
        end if
        call update_solo_selection
      end if
      %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send, %uiid5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
        set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0, get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 7, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        %set_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %lbl_mixer_channel_rev_send[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]

        call display_value_in_control_label
      end if
      %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%mnu_mixer_channel_out, %uiid5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])

        call update_mixer_channel_output
      end if
      inc(%idx44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
    call mixer_page_open
    $active_label_displays_ignore := 0
  end if

  $btn_dev_set_outputs := 0
end on

    $_iter800000 := ((($mnu_authoring_edit_all + (abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer)) * 128) * 25) - 1
    $i := $_stop4101
    while($i <= $_iter800000) 
      %_legato_data_sus_release_time[$i] := $sli_sustain_release
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    %_legato_data_sus_release_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($vlue_authoring_start_note * 25) + (abs($vlue_authoring_end_note - $vlue_authoring_start_note) + (- sh_right(- ($vlue_authoring_end_note - $vlue_authoring_start_note), 31) * 12)))] := $sli_sustain_release

end on

on ui_control($sli_trans_fadeOut_offset)
  $sli_trans_fadeOut_offset := (($sli_trans_fadeOut_offset * (1 + (sh_right((get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_fadeOut), $CONTROL_PAR_MAX_VALUE) - $sli_trans_fadeOut) - $sli_trans_fadeOut_offset, 31) .or. sh_right($sli_trans_fadeOut_offset - - $sli_trans_fadeOut, 31)))) - (- $sli_trans_fadeOut * sh_right($sli_trans_fadeOut_offset - - $sli_trans_fadeOut, 31))) - ((get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_fadeOut), $CONTROL_PAR_MAX_VALUE) - $sli_trans_fadeOut) * sh_right((get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_trans_fadeOut), $CONTROL_PAR_MAX_VALUE) - $sli_trans_fadeOut) - $sli_trans_fadeOut_offset, 31))
  if($mnu_authoring_edit_all > 0)
    $_iter800000 := ((abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer) * 128) * 25
    $_stop4101 := ((($mnu_authoring_edit_all + (abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer)) * 128) * 25) - 1
    $i := $_iter800000
    while($i <= $_stop4101) 
      %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time_offset[$i] := $sli_trans_fadeOut_offset
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($vlue_authoring_start_note * 25) + (abs($vlue_authoring_end_note - $vlue_authoring_start_note) + (- sh_right(- ($vlue_authoring_end_note - $vlue_authoring_start_note), 31) * 12)))] := $sli_trans_fadeOut_offset
  end if
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_trans_fadeOut), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int((real($sli_trans_fadeOut) / 1000000.) * 1500.) & " + " & int((real($sli_trans_fadeOut_offset) / 1000000.) * 1500.) & " ms")
end on
on ui_control($sli_sustain_wait)
  if($mnu_authoring_edit_all > 0)
    $_stop4101 := ((abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer) * 128) * 25
    $_iter800000 := ((($mnu_authoring_edit_all + (abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer)) * 128) * 25) - 1
    $i := $_stop4101
    while($i <= $_iter800000) 
      %_legato_data_sus_wait_time[$i] := $sli_sustain_wait
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    %_legato_data_sus_wait_time[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($vlue_authoring_start_note * 25) + (abs($vlue_authoring_end_note - $vlue_authoring_start_note) + (- sh_right(- ($vlue_authoring_end_note - $vlue_authoring_start_note), 31) * 12)))] := $sli_sustain_wait
  end if
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_sustain_wait), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int((real($sli_sustain_wait) / 1000000.) * 500.) & " + " & int((real($sli_sustain_wait_offset) / 1000000.) * 500.) & " ms")
end on

  if($mnu_authoring_edit_all > 0)
    $_iter800000 := ((abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer) * 128) * 25
    $_stop4101 := ((($mnu_authoring_edit_all + (abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer)) * 128) * 25) - 1

on ui_control($sli_sustain_fadeIn_offset)
  $sli_sustain_fadeIn_offset := (($sli_sustain_fadeIn_offset * (1 + (sh_right((get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_fadeIn), $CONTROL_PAR_MAX_VALUE) - $sli_sustain_fadeIn) - $sli_sustain_fadeIn_offset, 31) .or. sh_right($sli_sustain_fadeIn_offset - - $sli_sustain_fadeIn, 31)))) - (- $sli_sustain_fadeIn * sh_right($sli_sustain_fadeIn_offset - - $sli_sustain_fadeIn, 31))) - ((get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_fadeIn), $CONTROL_PAR_MAX_VALUE) - $sli_sustain_fadeIn) * sh_right((get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_sustain_fadeIn), $CONTROL_PAR_MAX_VALUE) - $sli_sustain_fadeIn) - $sli_sustain_fadeIn_offset, 31))
  if($mnu_authoring_edit_all > 0)
    $_iter800000 := ((abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer) * 128) * 25
    $_stop4101 := ((($mnu_authoring_edit_all + (abs(sh_right(abs(- sh_right(abs($mnu_authoring_edit_all - 2) - 1, 31)) - 1, 31)) * $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer)) * 128) * 25) - 1
    $i := $_iter800000
    while($i <= $_stop4101) 
      %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time_offset[$i] := $sli_sustain_fadeIn_offset
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time_offset[($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer * 3200) + (($vlue_authoring_start_note * 25) + (abs($vlue_authoring_end_note - $vlue_authoring_start_note) + (- sh_right(- ($vlue_authoring_end_note - $vlue_authoring_start_note), 31) * 12)))] := $sli_sustain_fadeIn_offset
  end if
  set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_sustain_fadeIn), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int((real($sli_sustain_fadeIn) / 1000000.) * 500.) & " + " & int((real($sli_sustain_fadeIn_offset) / 1000000.) * 500.) & " ms")
