on ui_control($btn_save_authoring)
  if($authoring_page_active = 1)
    $instrument0 := 0
    $keyswitch1 := 0
    $subarticulation_idx0 := 0
    $layer0 := 0
    $transition0 := 0
    $result7 := 0
    $note0 := 0
    while($note0 <= 1) 
      $layer0 := 0
      while($layer0 <= 127) 
        $transition0 := 0
        while($transition0 <= 24) 
          %_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time[($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time[($instrument0 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
          %_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time[($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_release_time[($instrument0 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
          %_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time[($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_wait_time[($instrument0 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
          %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time[($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time[($instrument0 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
          %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time[($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time[($instrument0 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
          %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start[($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_zone_start[($instrument0 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
          %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume[($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume[($instrument0 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
          %_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time_offset[($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_fade_in_time_offset[($instrument0 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
          %_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time_offset[($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_release_time_offset[($instrument0 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
          %_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time_offset[($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_sus_wait_time_offset[($instrument0 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
          %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time_offset[($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_fade_in_time_offset[($instrument0 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
          %_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_fade_out_time_offset[($instrument0 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
          %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start_offset[($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_zone_start_offset[($instrument0 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
          %_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume_offset[($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0)] := %_legato_data_trans_zone_volume_offset[($instrument0 * 204800) + (($keyswitch1 * 25600) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 6400) + (($note0 * 3200) + (($layer0 * 25) + $transition0))))]
          inc($transition0)
        end while
        inc($layer0)
      end while
      inc($note0)
    end while
    $result7 := 0
    while($result7 <= 127) 
      %legato_data_buffer_all_transitions_volume_curve[$result7] := %_legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[($instrument0 * 4096) + (($keyswitch1 * 512) + (($subarticulation_idx0 * 128) + $result7))]
      inc($result7)
    end while
    @name2 := "leg" & %_loaded_subarticulations[0]
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_fade_in_time.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_release_time.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_wait_time.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_trans_fade_in_time.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_trans_fade_out_time.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_trans_zone_start.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_trans_zone_wait.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_fade_in_time_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_release_time_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_wait_time_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_trans_fade_in_time_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_trans_fade_out_time_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_trans_zone_start_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_sus_trans_zone_wait_offset.nka")
    save_array_str(%legato_data_buffer_all_transitions_volume_curve, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & @name2 & "_all_transitions_volume_curve.nka")
  else
    message("No Legato Loaded")
  end if
  $btn_save_authoring := 0
end on
on ui_control($btn_load_authoring)
  if($authoring_page_active = 1)
    !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "leg" & %_loaded_subarticulations[0]
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_fade_in_time.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_release_time.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_wait_time.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_in_time.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_out_time.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_start.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_volume.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_fade_in_time_offset.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_release_time_offset.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_wait_time.nka_offset"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_in_time_offset.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_out_time_offset.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_start_offset.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_volume_offset.nka"))
    wait_async(load_array_str(%legato_data_buffer_all_transitions_volume_curve, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_all_transitions_volume_curve.nka"))
    $result7 := 0
    $transition0 := 0
    $layer0 := 0
    call move_legato_buffer_to_instrument
    $i30100 := 60
    $is_active0100 := 60
    $_ret37000 := 0
    call update_authoring_transition
    $_iter0 := 0
    while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%_stop600) - 1)) 
      %_stop600[$_iter0] := 0
      inc($_iter0)
    end while
    %_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 127) 
      %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[%_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %_legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[%_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      inc(%_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
  else
    message("No Legato Loaded")
  end if
  $btn_load_authoring := 0
end on
on ui_control($mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer)
  $i30100 := $vlue_authoring_start_note
  $is_active0100 := $vlue_authoring_end_note
  $_ret37000 := $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer
  call update_authoring_transition
end on
on ui_control($vlue_authoring_start_note)
  $i30100 := $vlue_authoring_start_note
  $is_active0100 := $vlue_authoring_end_note
  $_ret37000 := $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer
  call update_authoring_transition
end on
on ui_control($vlue_authoring_end_note)
  $i30100 := $vlue_authoring_start_note
  $is_active0100 := $vlue_authoring_end_note
  $_ret37000 := $mnu_authoring_dynamic_layer
  call update_authoring_transition
end on
on ui_control($btn_authoring_smooth_table)
  $_iter800000 := 0
  $_iter110000 := 0
  $_stop4101 := 0
  while($_stop4101 <= 127) 
    if($_stop4101 > 0)
      $_iter800000 := %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[$_stop4101 - 1]
    else
      $_iter800000 := %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[0]
    end if
    if($_stop4101 < 127)
      $_iter110000 := %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[$_stop4101 + 1]
    else
      $_iter110000 := %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[127]
    end if
    %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[$_stop4101] := (((%tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[$_stop4101] * 2) + $_iter800000) + $_iter110000) / 4
    %_legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[$_stop4101] := %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[$_stop4101]
    inc($_stop4101)
  end while
  $btn_authoring_smooth_table := 0
end on
on ui_control(%tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve)
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%_stop600) - 1)) 
    %_stop600[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  %_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%_step600) - 1)) 
    %_step600[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  wait(100000)
  if(%_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
    %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    while(%_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 127) 
      %_legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[%_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[%_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
      inc(%_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    end while
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_credits_backdrop)
  call credits_close
end on
on ui_control($btn_show_authoring_tools)
  if($btn_show_authoring_tools = 1)
    call find_loaded_legato
    $i30100 := 60
    $is_active0100 := 60
    $_ret37000 := 0
    call update_authoring_transition
    set_control_par(get_ui_id($pnl_authoring), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    $note15 := 0
    while($note15 <= 127) 
      %tbl_authoring_transition_volume_curve[$note15] := %_legato_data_all_transitions_volume_curve[$note15]
      inc($note15)
    end while
  else
    call authoring_close
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_dev_reload_all_legatos)
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%_step600) - 1)) 
    %_step600[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%_stop600) - 1)) 
    %_stop600[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  %_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%idx49) - 1)) 
    %idx49[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
  while(((%_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > 0)) or ((%_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0))) 
    $_iter0 := 0
    while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%inst6) - 1)) 
      %inst6[$_iter0] := 0
      inc($_iter0)
    end while
    %inst6[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    $_iter0 := 0
    while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%_step620) - 1)) 
      %_step620[$_iter0] := 0
      inc($_iter0)
    end while
    %_step620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
    $_iter0 := 0
    while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%_stop620) - 1)) 
      %_stop620[$_iter0] := 0
      inc($_iter0)
    end while
    %_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 8
    while(((%inst6[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < %_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%_step620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > 0)) or ((%inst6[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > %_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%_step620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0))) 
      $_iter0 := 0
      while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%k0) - 1)) 
        %k0[$_iter0] := 0
        inc($_iter0)
      end while
      %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      $_iter0 := 0
      while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%_step730) - 1)) 
        %_step730[$_iter0] := 0
        inc($_iter0)
      end while
      %_step730[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
      $_iter0 := 0
      while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%_stop730) - 1)) 
        %_stop730[$_iter0] := 0
        inc($_iter0)
      end while
      %_stop730[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 4
      while(((%k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < %_stop730[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%_step730[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > 0)) or ((%k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > %_stop730[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%_step730[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0))) 
        if(%_loaded_subarticulations[(%_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%inst6[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])] >= 0)
          if(%subarticulations_type[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%_loaded_subarticulations[(%_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%inst6[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])]]] = 2)
            !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "leg" & %_loaded_subarticulations[(%_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 32) + ((%inst6[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * 4) + %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])]
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_fade_in_time.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_release_time.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_wait_time.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_in_time.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_out_time.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_start.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_volume.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_fade_in_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_fade_in_time_offset.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_release_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_release_time_offset.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_sus_wait_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_wait_time.nka_offset"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_in_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_in_time_offset.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_fade_out_time_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_fade_out_time_offset.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_start_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_start_offset.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%_legato_data_buffer_trans_zone_volume_offset, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_sus_trans_zone_volume_offset.nka"))
            wait_async(load_array_str(%legato_data_buffer_all_transitions_volume_curve, @LEGATO_ARRAY_PATH & !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & "_all_transitions_volume_curve.nka"))
            $result7 := %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
            $transition0 := %inst6[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
            $layer0 := %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
            call move_legato_buffer_to_instrument
            message("Reloaded Legato for Instrument: " & %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & ", Keyswitch: " & %inst6[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & ", Subarticulation: " & %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end if
        end if
        %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %k0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + %_step730[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      end while
      %inst6[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %inst6[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + %_step620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
    end while
    %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + %_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
  end while
  $btn_dev_reload_all_legatos := 0
end on
on ui_control($btn_mixer_preset_save)
  if($btn_mixer_preset_save = 1)
    %mixer_preset_array[0] := -212121
    %mixer_preset_array[1] := 0
    %mixer_preset_array[2] := 1
    %mixer_preset_array[3] := - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31)
    $articulation_event_id4 := 0
    while($articulation_event_id4 <= 4) 
      %mixer_preset_array[4 + $articulation_event_id4] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_enable[$articulation_event_id4], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      %mixer_preset_array[9 + $articulation_event_id4] := get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_volume[$articulation_event_id4], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      %mixer_preset_array[14 + $articulation_event_id4] := get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_pan[$articulation_event_id4], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      %mixer_preset_array[19 + $articulation_event_id4] := get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[$articulation_event_id4], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      %mixer_preset_array[24 + $articulation_event_id4] := get_control_par(%mnu_mixer_channel_out[$articulation_event_id4], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      inc($articulation_event_id4)
    end while
    %mixer_preset_array[29] := $btn_mixer_eq_title
    %mixer_preset_array[30] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_low), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[31] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_mid), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[32] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_eq_high), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[33] := $btn_mixer_comp_title
    %mixer_preset_array[34] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_compression), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[35] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_comp_mix), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[36] := $btn_mixer_rev_title
    %mixer_preset_array[37] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($mnu_mixer_rev_preset), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[38] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_mixer_rev_return), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    %mixer_preset_array[39] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    save_array(%mixer_preset_array, 0)
    $btn_mixer_preset_save := 0
  else
    $btn_mixer_preset_save := 1
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_mixer_preset_load)
  if($btn_mixer_preset_load = 1)
    wait_async(load_array(%mixer_preset_array, 0))
    %abort0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    %abort0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    if(%mixer_preset_array[0] # -212121)
      %set_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_preset_load_error_message)
      !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "This is not a valid mixer preset file."
      !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""
      call display_value_in_control_label

    end if
    if(%mixer_preset_array[1] # 0)
      %set_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_preset_load_error_message)

      !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ""

    if(%mixer_preset_array[2] # 1)

    if(%mixer_preset_array[3] # - sh_right(abs($nki_type) - 1, 31))

        inc(%i53[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %mixer_preset_array[39])
      $active_label_displays_ignore := 1
      %idx44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      %idx44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%idx44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 4) 
        %uiid5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %btn_mixer_channel_enable[%idx44[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
        %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
        %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%sli_mixer_channel_volume, %uiid5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])

          %set_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %lbl_mixer_channel_volume[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]

          else

          !___print_string1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "microphone_position_states[" & num_elements(%microphone_position_states) & "]: "

            inc($_iter0)
          end while
          $allow_repetitions00 := 0
          $fade_in_range001 := 0
          $fade_out_end010 := 1
          $fade_in_range010 := num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0)
          while((($fade_in_range001 < $fade_in_range010) and ($fade_out_end010 > 0)) or (($fade_in_range001 > $fade_in_range010) and ($fade_out_end010 < 0))) 
            %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$fade_in_range001] := $allow_repetitions00
            $fade_in_range001 := $fade_in_range001 + $fade_out_end010
          end while
          $i46 := 0
          while($i46 <= 0) 
            $ii9 := 0
            while($ii9 <= 7) 
              $iii2 := 0
              while($iii2 <= 3) 
                if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i46 * 32) + (($ii9 * 4) + $iii2)] # -1)
                  %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i46 * 32) + (($ii9 * 4) + $iii2)]] := %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i46 * 32) + (($ii9 * 4) + $iii2)]] + %_keyswitch_purge_states[($i46 * 8) + $ii9]
                end if
                inc($iii2)

              inc($ii9)
            end while
            inc($i46)
          end while
          $i46 := 0
          while($i46 <= 511) 
            if(%subarticulations_ids[$i46] >= 0)
              if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i46]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
                if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i46]] = 0)
                  $lowest00 := %subarticulations_ids[$i46]
                  $highest1 := 0
                  $i := 0
                  $ks00 := $lowest00
                  call subarticulation_group_count
                  $lowest1 := $highest00
                  while($i <= ($lowest1 - 1)) 
                    purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest00]] + $i) + 1, $highest1 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
                    inc($i)
                    $ks00 := $lowest00
                    call subarticulation_group_count
                    $lowest1 := $highest00
                  end while
                  $i351 := $lowest1
                end if
              end if
            end if

          end while
          $i46 := 0
          while($i46 <= 511)

                  $lowest00 := %subarticulations_ids[$i46]
                  $highest1 := 1
                  $i := 0
                  $ks00 := $lowest00
                  call subarticulation_group_count
                  $lowest1 := $highest00

                    $lowest1 := $highest00

            %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + (1 - $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel)] := 0

            inc($_iter0)

            $fade_in_range001 := $fade_in_range001 + $fade_out_end010

          $i46 := 0

            $ii9 := 0

              $iii2 := 0
              while($iii2 <= 3)

                end if
                inc($iii2)

              inc($ii9)
            end while
            inc($i46)
          end while
          $i46 := 0

on ui_control($mnu_mixer_preset)
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(!preset_path1) - 1)) 
    !preset_path1[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  !preset_path1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := @mixer_path & get_menu_item_str(get_ui_id($mnu_mixer_preset), $mnu_mixer_preset) & ".nka"
  wait_async(load_array_str(%mixer_preset_array, !preset_path1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]))
  %abort0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %abort0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  if(%mixer_preset_array[0] # -212121)

  end if
  if(%mixer_preset_array[1] # 0)
    %set_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_ui_id($lbl_mixer_preset_load_error_message)

          while($ii9 <= 7) 
            $iii2 := 0
            while($iii2 <= 3) 
              if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i46 * 32) + (($ii9 * 4) + $iii2)] # -1)
                %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i46 * 32) + (($ii9 * 4) + $iii2)]] := %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i46 * 32) + (($ii9 * 4) + $iii2)]] + %_keyswitch_purge_states[($i46 * 8) + $ii9]
              end if
              inc($iii2)
            end while
            inc($ii9)
          end while
          inc($i46)
        end while
        $i46 := 0
        while($i46 <= 511) 
          if(%subarticulations_ids[$i46] >= 0)
            if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i46]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
              if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i46]] = 0)
                $lowest00 := %subarticulations_ids[$i46]
                $highest1 := 0
                $i := 0
                $ks00 := $lowest00
                call subarticulation_group_count
                $lowest1 := $highest00
                while($i <= ($lowest1 - 1)) 
                  purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest00]] + $i) + 1, $highest1 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
                  inc($i)
                  $ks00 := $lowest00
                  call subarticulation_group_count
                  $lowest1 := $highest00
                end while
                $i351 := $lowest1
              end if
            end if
          end if
          inc($i46)
        end while
        $i46 := 0
        while($i46 <= 511) 
          if(%subarticulations_ids[$i46] >= 0)

                $lowest00 := %subarticulations_ids[$i46]
                $highest1 := 1
                $i := 0
                $ks00 := $lowest00
                call subarticulation_group_count
                $lowest1 := $highest00
                while($i <= ($lowest1 - 1)) 
                  purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest00]] + $i) + 1, $highest1 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
                  inc($i)

on ui_control($btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel)
  %uiid5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %btn_mixer_channel_enable[4]
  %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
  %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%sli_mixer_channel_volume, %uiid5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_GN_GAIN, get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_volume[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 6, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    %set_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %lbl_mixer_channel_volume[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]
    !legato_name1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := get_engine_par_disp($ENGINE_PAR_GN_GAIN, -1, 6, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    !unit0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := " dB"
    call display_value_in_control_label
  end if
  %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_mixer_channel_enable, %uiid5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
    if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 4)
      %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_enable[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    else
      %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_enable[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + (1 - $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel)] := 0
    end if
    !___print_string1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := "microphone_position_states[" & num_elements(%microphone_position_states) & "]: "
    %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
    %_step680[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 1
    %_stop680[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := num_elements(%microphone_position_states)
    while(((%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < %_stop680[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%_step680[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > 0)) or ((%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > %_stop680[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) and (%_step680[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0))) 
      !___print_string1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := !___print_string1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & %microphone_position_states[%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] & ", "
      %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + %_step680[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
    end while
    message(!___print_string1[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    call update_mixer_channels
    message("execute purge command")
    $i46 := 0
    $ii9 := 0
    $iii2 := 0
    $_iter0 := 0
    while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0) - 1)) 
      %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$_iter0] := 0
      inc($_iter0)
    end while
    $allow_repetitions00 := 0
    $fade_in_range001 := 0
    $fade_out_end010 := 1
    $fade_in_range010 := num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0)
    while((($fade_in_range001 < $fade_in_range010) and ($fade_out_end010 > 0)) or (($fade_in_range001 > $fade_in_range010) and ($fade_out_end010 < 0))) 
      %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$fade_in_range001] := $allow_repetitions00
      $fade_in_range001 := $fade_in_range001 + $fade_out_end010
    end while
    $i46 := 0
    while($i46 <= 0) 
      $ii9 := 0
      while($ii9 <= 7) 
        $iii2 := 0
        while($iii2 <= 3) 
          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i46 * 32) + (($ii9 * 4) + $iii2)] # -1)
            %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i46 * 32) + (($ii9 * 4) + $iii2)]] := %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i46 * 32) + (($ii9 * 4) + $iii2)]] + %_keyswitch_purge_states[($i46 * 8) + $ii9]
          end if
          inc($iii2)
        end while
        inc($ii9)
      end while
      inc($i46)
    end while
    $i46 := 0
    while($i46 <= 511) 
      if(%subarticulations_ids[$i46] >= 0)
        if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i46]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
          if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i46]] = 0)
            $lowest00 := %subarticulations_ids[$i46]
            $highest1 := 0
            $i := 0
            $ks00 := $lowest00
            call subarticulation_group_count
            $lowest1 := $highest00
            while($i <= ($lowest1 - 1)) 
              purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest00]] + $i) + 1, $highest1 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
              inc($i)
              $ks00 := $lowest00
              call subarticulation_group_count
              $lowest1 := $highest00
            end while
            $i351 := $lowest1
          end if
        end if
      end if
      inc($i46)
    end while
    $i46 := 0
    while($i46 <= 511) 
      if(%subarticulations_ids[$i46] >= 0)
        if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i46]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
          if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i46]] > 0)
            $lowest00 := %subarticulations_ids[$i46]
            $highest1 := 1
            $i := 0
            $ks00 := $lowest00
            call subarticulation_group_count
            $lowest1 := $highest00
            while($i <= ($lowest1 - 1)) 
              purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest00]] + $i) + 1, $highest1 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
              inc($i)
              $ks00 := $lowest00
              call subarticulation_group_count
              $lowest1 := $highest00
            end while
            $_step2501 := $lowest1
          end if
        end if
      end if
      inc($i46)
    end while
  end if
  %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input, %uiid5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
    if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 4)
      %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    else
      %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel] := get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_disable_input[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
      %microphone_position_states[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + (1 - $btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel)] := 0
    end if
    call update_mixer_channels
    message("execute purge command")
    $i46 := 0
    $ii9 := 0
    $iii2 := 0
    $_iter0 := 0
    while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0) - 1)) 
      %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$_iter0] := 0
      inc($_iter0)
    end while
    $allow_repetitions00 := 0
    $fade_in_range001 := 0
    $fade_out_end010 := 1
    $fade_in_range010 := num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0)
    while((($fade_in_range001 < $fade_in_range010) and ($fade_out_end010 > 0)) or (($fade_in_range001 > $fade_in_range010) and ($fade_out_end010 < 0))) 
      %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$fade_in_range001] := $allow_repetitions00
      $fade_in_range001 := $fade_in_range001 + $fade_out_end010
    end while
    $i46 := 0
    while($i46 <= 0) 
      $ii9 := 0
      while($ii9 <= 7) 
        $iii2 := 0
        while($iii2 <= 3) 
          if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i46 * 32) + (($ii9 * 4) + $iii2)] # -1)
            %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i46 * 32) + (($ii9 * 4) + $iii2)]] := %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i46 * 32) + (($ii9 * 4) + $iii2)]] + %_keyswitch_purge_states[($i46 * 8) + $ii9]
          end if
          inc($iii2)
        end while
        inc($ii9)
      end while
      inc($i46)
    end while
    $i46 := 0
    while($i46 <= 511) 
      if(%subarticulations_ids[$i46] >= 0)
        if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i46]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
          if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i46]] = 0)
            $lowest00 := %subarticulations_ids[$i46]
            $highest1 := 0
            $i := 0
            $ks00 := $lowest00
            call subarticulation_group_count
            $lowest1 := $highest00

              purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest00]] + $i) + 1, $highest1 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
              inc($i)

              call subarticulation_group_count
              $lowest1 := $highest00
            end while
            $i351 := $lowest1
          end if
        end if
      end if
      inc($i46)
    end while
    $i46 := 0
    while($i46 <= 511) 
      if(%subarticulations_ids[$i46] >= 0)
        if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i46]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
          if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i46]] > 0)
            $lowest00 := %subarticulations_ids[$i46]
            $highest1 := 1
            $i := 0
            $ks00 := $lowest00
            call subarticulation_group_count
            $lowest1 := $highest00

              purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest00]] + $i) + 1, $highest1 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
              inc($i)
              $ks00 := $lowest00
              call subarticulation_group_count
              $lowest1 := $highest00
            end while
            $_step2501 := $lowest1
          end if
        end if
      end if
      inc($i46)
    end while
  end if
  %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%sli_mixer_channel_pan, %uiid5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_STEREO_PAN, get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_pan[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 5, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  end if
  %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_mixer_channel_solo, %uiid5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
    set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    if((get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1) or (get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1))
      %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 4) 
        set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        inc(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      end while
      set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL))
    end if
    call update_solo_selection
  end if
  %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%btn_mixer_channel_mute, %uiid5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
    set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_solo[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
    if((get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_ALT) = 1) or (get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1))
      %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      %i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := 0
      while(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] <= 4) 
        set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, 0)
        inc(%i48[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])

      set_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(%btn_mixer_channel_mute[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL))
    end if
    call update_solo_selection
  end if
  %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send, %uiid5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_SENDLEVEL_0, get_control_par(%sli_mixer_channel_rev_send[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), -1, 7, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    %set_id0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %lbl_mixer_channel_rev_send[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]]

    call display_value_in_control_label
  end if
  %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := search(%mnu_mixer_channel_out, %uiid5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
  if(%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] # -1)
    set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_OUTPUT_CHANNEL, get_control_par(%mnu_mixer_channel_out[%idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) - 1, -1, -1, $NI_BUS_OFFSET + %idx42[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    call update_mixer_channel_output
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_channel_bleed_channel_off), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[1 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)])
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_channel_bleed_channel_on), $CONTROL_PAR_FONT_TYPE, %font_label_small[get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mixer_switch_bleed_channel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)])
end on
on ui_control($btn_unpurge_all)
  if($btn_unpurge_all = 1)
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%microphone_position_states) - 1)) 
      %microphone_position_states[$i] := 1
      inc($i)
    end while
  else
    $i := 0
    while($i <= (num_elements(%microphone_position_states) - 1)) 
      %microphone_position_states[$i] := 0
      inc($i)
    end while
  end if
  message("execute purge command")
  $i46 := 0
  $ii9 := 0
  $iii2 := 0
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0) - 1)) 
    %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  $allow_repetitions00 := 0
  $fade_in_range001 := 0
  $fade_out_end010 := 1
  $fade_in_range010 := num_elements(%subarticulation_is_loaded0)
  while((($fade_in_range001 < $fade_in_range010) and ($fade_out_end010 > 0)) or (($fade_in_range001 > $fade_in_range010) and ($fade_out_end010 < 0))) 
    %subarticulation_is_loaded0[$fade_in_range001] := $allow_repetitions00
    $fade_in_range001 := $fade_in_range001 + $fade_out_end010
  end while
  $i46 := 0
  while($i46 <= 0) 
    $ii9 := 0
    while($ii9 <= 7) 
      $iii2 := 0
      while($iii2 <= 3) 
        if(%_loaded_subarticulations[($i46 * 32) + (($ii9 * 4) + $iii2)] # -1)
          %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i46 * 32) + (($ii9 * 4) + $iii2)]] := %subarticulation_is_loaded0[%_loaded_subarticulations[($i46 * 32) + (($ii9 * 4) + $iii2)]] + %_keyswitch_purge_states[($i46 * 8) + $ii9]
        end if
        inc($iii2)
      end while
      inc($ii9)
    end while
    inc($i46)
  end while
  $i46 := 0
  while($i46 <= 511) 
    if(%subarticulations_ids[$i46] >= 0)
      if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i46]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
        if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i46]] = 0)
          $lowest00 := %subarticulations_ids[$i46]
          $highest1 := 0
          $i := 0
          $ks00 := $lowest00
          call subarticulation_group_count
          $lowest1 := $highest00
          while($i <= ($lowest1 - 1)) 
            purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest00]] + $i) + 1, $highest1 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
            inc($i)
            $ks00 := $lowest00
            call subarticulation_group_count
            $lowest1 := $highest00
          end while
          $i351 := $lowest1
        end if
      end if
    end if
    inc($i46)
  end while
  $i46 := 0
  while($i46 <= 511) 
    if(%subarticulations_ids[$i46] >= 0)
      if(%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[%subarticulations_ids[$i46]]] # $NI_NOT_FOUND)
        if(%subarticulation_is_loaded0[%subarticulations_ids[$i46]] > 0)
          $lowest00 := %subarticulations_ids[$i46]
          $highest1 := 1
          $i := 0
          $ks00 := $lowest00
          call subarticulation_group_count
          $lowest1 := $highest00
          while($i <= ($lowest1 - 1)) 
            purge_group((%subarticulations_group_idx[%subarticulations_ids_positions[$lowest00]] + $i) + 1, $highest1 * %microphone_position_states[$i mod 6])
            inc($i)
            $ks00 := $lowest00
            call subarticulation_group_count
            $lowest1 := $highest00
          end while
          $_step2501 := $lowest1
        end if
      end if
    end if
    inc($i46)
  end while

on ui_control($mnu_mixer_rev_preset)
  %uiid5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $mnu_mixer_rev_preset
  wait_async(load_array_str(%reverb_preset_array, @REVERB_PRESET_PATH & "reverb_preset" & %uiid5[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] & ".nka"))
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_TYPE, %reverb_preset_array[0], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY, %reverb_preset_array[1], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_PREDELAY_UNIT, %reverb_preset_array[2], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_FEEDBACK, %reverb_preset_array[3], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_LOWSHELF, %reverb_preset_array[4], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_HIGHCUT, %reverb_preset_array[5], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DECAY, %reverb_preset_array[6], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_MOD, %reverb_preset_array[7], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_REVERB, %reverb_preset_array[8], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DIFFUSION, %reverb_preset_array[9], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_SIZE, %reverb_preset_array[10], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_DAMPING, %reverb_preset_array[11], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_RATE, %reverb_preset_array[12], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_FREEZE, %reverb_preset_array[13], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
  set_engine_par($ENGINE_PAR_RAUM_SPARSE, %reverb_preset_array[14], -1, 0, $NI_SEND_BUS)
end on

on ui_control($mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve)
  if($mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve = 0)
    %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 5
    %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 127
    %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 40
  else
    if($mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve = 1)
      %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 0
      %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 127
      %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 40
    else
      if($mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve = 2)
        %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 5
        %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 127
        %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 0
      else
        if($mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve = 3)
          %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 0
          %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 127
          %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 0
        else
          if($mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve = 4)
            %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 127
            %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 127
            %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := 0
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
  call update_keyswitch_volume_curve
end on
on ui_control($btn_keyswitch_velocity_to_modwheel)
  %_articulation_mw_to_velocity[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_keyswitch_velocity_to_modwheel), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
end on
on ui_control($btn_solo_subarticulation)
  %_subarticulations_solo_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $displayed_subarticulation)] := $btn_solo_subarticulation
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_solo_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
    $subarticulations_solo_states_any_active := 1
  else
    if(search(%_subarticulations_solo_states, 1) = -1)
      $subarticulations_solo_states_any_active := 0
    end if
  end if
  set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_solo[$displayed_subarticulation], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_solo_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
end on
on ui_control($btn_mute_subarticulation)
  %_subarticulations_mute_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $displayed_subarticulation)] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mute_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  set_control_par(%btn_editor_overview_mute[$displayed_subarticulation], $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_mute_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE))
end on

  call update_subarticulation_selection
end on

  call update_subarticulation_selection
  $btn_editor_overview0 := 0
end on

  %_subarticulations_solo_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + ($selected_keyswitch * 4)] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_editor_overview_solo0), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_editor_overview_solo0), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
    $subarticulations_solo_states_any_active := 1
  else
    if(search(%_subarticulations_solo_states, 1) = -1)
      $subarticulations_solo_states_any_active := 0
    end if
  end if
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_solo_subarticulation), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, %_subarticulations_solo_states[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $displayed_subarticulation)])
end on

on ui_control($btn_subarticulation_title)
  if((get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_title), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1) and ($nki_type # 2))
    call subarticulation_browser_open
  else
    call subarticulation_browser_close
  end if
end on
on ui_control($btn_subarticulation_browse)
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id($btn_subarticulation_browse), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) = 1)
    call subarticulation_browser_open
  else
    call subarticulation_browser_close
  end if
end on
on ui_control($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min)
  $ksv_cb_id := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  wait(10000)
  if($ksv_cb_id = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
    %_articulation_volume_min[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_min), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 5
    call update_keyswitch_volume_curve
  end if
end on
on ui_control($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max)
  $ksv_cb_id := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  wait(10000)
  if($ksv_cb_id = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
    %_articulation_volume_max[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve_max), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)
    $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 5
    call update_keyswitch_volume_curve
  end if
end on
on ui_control($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve)
  $ksv_cb_id := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  wait(10000)
  if($ksv_cb_id = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
    %_articulation_volume_curve[($selected_instrument * 8) + $selected_keyswitch] := get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_keyswitch_volume_curve), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * -1
    $mnu_keyswitch_volume_curve := 5
    call update_keyswitch_volume_curve
  end if
end on
on ui_control(?xy_modwheel_assignment)
  ?xy_modwheel_assignment[1] := 1.
  ?xy_modwheel_assignment[5] := 1.
  if($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN)
    if((get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 0) or (get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 4))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_PART_NOTHING)
    end if
  else
    if($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_UP)
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_HIDE, $HIDE_WHOLE_CONTROL)
    end if
  end if
  $ma_cb_id := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 2)
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1)
      ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := 0.
    end if
  else
    if(((get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 0) and (?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] <= ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0])) and (?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] <= ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]))
      set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 20)))
      if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1)
        ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]
      end if
    else
      if(((get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 4) and (?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] <= ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4])) and (?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] <= ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6]))
        set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_fade_circle_md), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X, get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_X) + int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] * real(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_WIDTH) - 20)))
        if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1)
          ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6]
        end if
      else
        if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 6)
          if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1)
            ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := 1.
          end if
        else
          if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = -1)
            if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1)
              ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] := 0.
              ?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] := 0.
              ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4] := 1.
              ?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] := 1.
            end if
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
  end if
  wait(5000)
  if($ma_cb_id = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
    $_iter0 := 0
    while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%idx49) - 1)) 
      %idx49[$_iter0] := 0
      inc($_iter0)
    end while
    $_iter0 := 0
    while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%_stop600) - 1)) 
      %_stop600[$_iter0] := 0
      inc($_iter0)
    end while
    $_iter0 := 0
    while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%_step600) - 1)) 
      %_step600[$_iter0] := 0
      inc($_iter0)
    end while
    $_iter0 := 0
    while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%_stop620) - 1)) 
      %_stop620[$_iter0] := 0
      inc($_iter0)
    end while
    $_step2500 := - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) - 2) - 1, 31)
    $_stop2500 := int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[2] * 127.)
    $_stop5700 := %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
    call switch
    %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $i350
    $_step2500 := - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX)) - 1, 31)
    $_stop2500 := int(ceil((?xy_modwheel_assignment[0] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[2]) * 127.))
    $_stop5700 := %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
    call switch
    %_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $i350
    $_step2500 := - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) - 4) - 1, 31)
    $_stop2500 := int(floor((?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] - ?xy_modwheel_assignment[4]) * 127.))
    $_stop5700 := %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
    call switch
    %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $i350
    $_step2500 := - sh_right(abs(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) - 6) - 1, 31)
    $_stop2500 := int(?xy_modwheel_assignment[6] * 127.)
    $_stop5700 := %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]
    call switch
    %_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $i350
    %_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - (%_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] .and. sh_right(%_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31))
    %_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - ((%_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - ((%_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) - %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])) .and. sh_right(((%_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) - %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) - %_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31))
    %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - (%_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] .and. sh_right(%_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31))
    %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - ((%_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - ((%_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) - %_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])) .and. sh_right(((%_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) - %_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) - %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31))
    %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - ((%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - ((%_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) - %_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])) .and. sh_right(((%_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) - %_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) - %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31))
    %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := (%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * (1 + (sh_right(127 - %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31) .or. sh_right(%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31)))) - (127 * sh_right(127 - %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31))
    %_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := %_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - ((%_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - ((%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + %_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) + %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])) .and. sh_right(%_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - ((%idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] + %_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]) + %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]), 31))
    %_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := (%_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * (1 + (sh_right(127 - %_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31) .or. sh_right(%_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31)))) - (127 * sh_right(127 - %_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31))
    if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 2)
      set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_value), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
    else
      if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 0)
        set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_value), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, %_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
      else
        if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 4)
          set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_value), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
        else
          if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_modwheel_assignment), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 6)
            set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_value), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, %_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100])
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := %idx49[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
    %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := %_stop600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
    %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
    %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := %_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
    call update_modwheel_assignment_control
    call update_modwheel_assignment_circles
  end if
  wait(1990000)
  if($ma_cb_id = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_modwheel_assignment_value), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, "")
  end if
end on
on ui_control(?xy_dynamic_range)
  $dr_cb_id := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  if((get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_dynamic_range), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 0) and (?xy_dynamic_range[0] <= ?xy_dynamic_range[2]))
    %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := int(?xy_dynamic_range[0] * 127.)
  else
    if((get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_dynamic_range), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX) = 2) and (?xy_dynamic_range[0] <= ?xy_dynamic_range[2]))
      %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := int(?xy_dynamic_range[2] * 127.)
    end if
  end if
  if(get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_dynamic_range), $CONTROL_PAR_KEY_CONTROL) = 1)
    %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_lower[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := 0
    %_loaded_subarticulations_dynamic_range_upper[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := 127
  end if
  wait(10000)
  if($dr_cb_id = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)
    set_control_par_str(get_ui_id($lbl_dynamic_range_label), $CONTROL_PAR_TEXT, int(?xy_dynamic_range[get_control_par(get_ui_id(?xy_dynamic_range), $CONTROL_PAR_ACTIVE_INDEX)] * 127.))
    call update_dynamic_range_control
  end if
  wait(1990000)
  if($dr_cb_id = $NI_CALLBACK_ID)

on ui_control(?xy_center_circles)
  $cc_cb_id := $NI_CALLBACK_ID
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(?angle2) - 1)) 
    ?angle2[$_iter0] := 0.
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(%_stop620) - 1)) 
    %_stop620[$_iter0] := 0
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  $_iter0 := 0
  while($_iter0 <= (num_elements(?distance0) - 1)) 
    ?distance0[$_iter0] := 0.
    inc($_iter0)
  end while
  if($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_LEFT_BUTTON_DOWN)
    ~fade_level0 := ?xy_center_circles[0]
    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength00 := ?xy_center_circles[1]
    ~fade_level00 := ~fade_level0 - 0.5
    ~weight0 := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength00 - 0.5
    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 := sqrt((~fade_level00 * ~fade_level00) + (~weight0 * ~weight0))
    ?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000
    ~fade_level00 := ?xy_center_circles[0]
    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength00 := ?xy_center_circles[1]
    call center_circle_angle
    ?angle2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ~weight0
    ~fade_level01 := ?angle2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength001 := 0.7
    ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 := (~NI_MATH_PI * 2.) - 0.7
    call angle_to_value
    %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $result12
    %_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := (%_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * (1 + (sh_right(127 - %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31) .or. sh_right(%_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31)))) - (127 * sh_right(127 - %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31))
    if((?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] >= 0.14) and (?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0.175))
      $selected_subarticulation := 3
    else
      if((?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] >= 0.175) and (?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0.21))
        $selected_subarticulation := 2
      else
        if((?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] >= 0.21) and (?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0.242))
          $selected_subarticulation := 1
        else
          if((?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] >= 0.242) and (?distance0[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < 0.29))
            $selected_subarticulation := 0
          else
            $selected_subarticulation := -1
          end if
        end if
      end if
    end if
    if($selected_subarticulation >= 0)
      if(abs(%_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) < 10)
        $selected_circle_end := 0
      else
        if(abs(%_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] - %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) < 10)
          $selected_circle_end := 1
        else
          $selected_circle_end := -1
        end if
      end if
    else
      $selected_circle_end := -1
    end if
    call update_subarticulation_selection
  end if
  if($NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE = $NI_MOUSE_EVENT_TYPE_DRAG)
    wait(10000)
    if(($cc_cb_id = $NI_CALLBACK_ID) and ($selected_circle_end # -1))
      ~fade_level00 := ?xy_center_circles[0]
      ~subarticulation_modulation_strength00 := ?xy_center_circles[1]
      call center_circle_angle
      ?angle2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := ~weight0
      ~fade_level01 := ?angle2[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
      ~subarticulation_modulation_strength001 := 0.7
      ~subarticulation_modulation_strength000 := (~NI_MATH_PI * 2.) - 0.7
      call angle_to_value
      %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := $result12
      %_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] := (%_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] * (1 + (sh_right(127 - %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31) .or. sh_right(%_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31)))) - (127 * sh_right(127 - %_step600[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100], 31))
      if($selected_circle_end = 0)
        if(%_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] < ((%_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) - %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]))
          %_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := %_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
        end if
      else
        if($selected_circle_end = 1)
          if(%_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100] > ((%_loaded_subarticulations_start[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_in[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]) + %_loaded_subarticulations_fade_out[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)]))
            %_loaded_subarticulations_end[($selected_instrument * 32) + (($selected_keyswitch * 4) + $selected_subarticulation)] := %_stop620[$NI_CALLBACK_ID mod 100]
          end if
        end if
      end if
      call update_modwheel_assignment_control
      call update_modwheel_assignment_circles
    end if
  end if
end on

                while($i <= ($lowest1 - 1))

                  inc($i)
                  $ks00 := $lowest00
                  call subarticulation_group_count
                  $lowest1 := $highest00
                end while
                $i351 := $lowest1
              end if

on ui_control($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar)
  $ret502003 := 195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT)
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE, (get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE) * (1 + (sh_right($ret502003 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), 31) .or. sh_right(get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), 31)))) - ($ret502003 * sh_right($ret502003 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE), 31)))
  set_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_POS_Y, 160 + ((abs($ret502003 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * (195 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($lbl_subarticulation_browser_handle), $CONTROL_PAR_HEIGHT))) / $ret502003))
  $subarticulation_browser_scroll_offset := (abs($ret502003 - get_control_par(get_ui_id($sli_subarticulation_browser_scrollbar), $CONTROL_PAR_VALUE)) * ($subarticulation_browser_scroll_num_entries - 8)) / $ret502003
  call apply_scroll_offset
end on
